@sl-slua/global/ll.Log.documentation: Returns a float representing the natural (base e) logarithm of the positive value val (returns 0.0 if val <= 0).

@sl-slua/global/ll.Log10.documentation: Returns a float representing the base-10 (common) logarithm of the positive value val (returns 0.0 if val <= 0).

@sl-slua/global/ll.LookAt.documentation: Causes the object to orient its positive Z-axis (up axis) toward the target vector, keeping its positive X-axis (forward axis) below the horizon. Tracks target until llStopLookAt is called or strength is set to 0.0.

@sl-slua/global/ll.LoopSound.documentation: Plays the attached sound looping indefinitely at the specified volume. Only one sound can be attached to a prim at a time; new loops adjust the volume of the currently playing sound without restarting it.

@sl-slua/global/ll.LoopSoundMaster.documentation: Plays the attached sound looping indefinitely at the specified volume and declares it a Sync Master, forcing slave sounds to synchronize with it.

@sl-slua/global/ll.LoopSoundSlave.documentation: Plays the attached sound looping indefinitely at the specified volume, synchronized to the most audible active Sync Master in range.

@sl-slua/global/ll.MD5String.documentation: Returns a string of 32 hex characters representing the MD5 checksum of src salted with nonce (formatted as ':' + nonce).

@sl-slua/global/ll.MakeExplosion.documentation: Deprecated. Generates a circular explosion of particles. Use llParticleSystem instead.

@sl-slua/global/ll.MakeFire.documentation: Deprecated. Generates fire-like particles. Use llParticleSystem instead.

@sl-slua/global/ll.MakeFountain.documentation: Deprecated. Generates a fountain of particles. Use llParticleSystem instead.

@sl-slua/global/ll.MakeSmoke.documentation: Deprecated. Generates smoke-like particles. Use llParticleSystem instead.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ManageEstateAccess.documentation: Adds or removes agents from the estate's access or ban lists, or groups from the estate's group access list, specified by the action. Returns TRUE if successful, or FALSE if throttled, if the action/ID is invalid, or if the script owner lacks estate management rights.

@sl-slua/global/ll.MapBeacon.documentation: Displays an in-world beacon and optionally opens the world map for the avatar touching or wearing the object, centered on region_name with pos highlighted. Only works for attached scripts or during touch events.

@sl-slua/global/ll.MapDestination.documentation: Opens the world map for the avatar touching or wearing the object, centered on simname with pos highlighted. Only works for attached scripts or during touch events. Note: look_at currently has no effect.

@sl-slua/global/ll.MessageLinked.documentation: Triggers a link_message event, sending num, str, and id to the scripts in the prim(s) specified by link to allow scripts within the same object to communicate.

@sl-slua/global/ll.MinEventDelay.documentation: Sets the minimum delay time between events being handled (minimums and defaults vary by event type).

@sl-slua/global/ll.ModPow.documentation: Returns an integer representing a raised to the power b, modulo c (i.e., (a**b)%c). The b value is capped at 0xFFFF (16 bits).

@sl-slua/global/ll.ModifyLand.documentation: Modifies the terrain using the specified land action and brush size (0, 1, or 2, corresponding to 2m x 2m, 4m x 4m, or 8m x 8m).

@sl-slua/global/ll.MoveToTarget.documentation: Critically damps the physical object's motion to position target in tau seconds. Setting tau to 0.0 stops the critical damping; recommended tau values are greater than 0.2.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Name2Key.documentation: Requests the key (UUID) of the avatar name in the current region. Returns NULL_KEY if no matching agent is present. Formats are 'First Last' or 'first.last' (assumes 'Resident' if last name is omitted; case-insensitive).

@sl-slua/global/ll.NavigateTo.documentation: Directs a pathfinding character to navigate to the position pos (located in the current or adjacent regions) using the parameters specified in options.

@sl-slua/global/ll.OffsetTexture.documentation: Sets the texture horizontal (u) and vertical (v) offsets for the chosen face. If face is ALL_SIDES, offsets all faces.

@sl-slua/global/ll.OpenFloater.documentation: Opens the specified viewer floater_name loaded with url and configured via params. Returns an integer error code, or 0 if successful.

@sl-slua/global/ll.OpenRemoteDataChannel.documentation: Deprecated. Creates a channel to listen for incoming XML-RPC calls, triggering a remote_data event with the channel ID once available.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Ord.documentation: Returns the integer Unicode (ordinal) value of the character at index in the string val.

@sl-slua/global/ll.OverMyLand.documentation: Returns TRUE if the avatar or object specified by key id is over land owned by the script owner, or FALSE otherwise.

@sl-slua/global/ll.OwnerSay.documentation: Sends the chat message msg privately to the object owner (the owner must be currently in the same region for the message to be received).

@sl-slua/global/ll.ParcelMediaCommandLis.documentation: Controls the playback of movies and other multimedia resources on a parcel or for an agent, using the PARCEL_MEDIA_COMMAND_* settings specified in commandList.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ParcelMediaQuery.documentation: Queries the media properties of the parcel containing the script, returning a list of values in the order requested by query. Only works if the object is owned by the landowner or deeded to the land's group.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ParseString2List.documentation: Breaks the string src into a list of substrings, discarding any separators, keeping spacers, and omitting any empty null values. separators and spacers accept up to 8 string entries each.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ParseStringKeepNulls.documentation: Breaks the string src into a list, discarding separators and keeping spacers, while preserving empty null values (unlike llParseString2List). separators and spacers accept up to 8 string entries each.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ParticleSystem.documentation: Creates or updates a particle system on the prim containing the script based on rules. An empty list removes the particle system.

@sl-slua/global/ll.PassCollisions.documentation: Sets the pass-collisions attribute. If pass is TRUE, collision events are passed from child prims to the root; if FALSE (default), they only trigger events in the affected child prim.

@sl-slua/global/ll.PassTouches.documentation: Sets the pass-touches attribute. If pass is TRUE, touch events are passed from child prims to the root; if FALSE (default), they only trigger events in the affected child prim.

@sl-slua/global/ll.PatrolPoints.documentation: Directs a pathfinding character to patrol sequentially through the coordinates specified in patrolPoints, configured by options.

@sl-slua/global/ll.PlaySound.documentation: Plays the specified sound once at volume, attached to the object. Only one sound can be attached to a prim at a time; new sounds or calling llStopSound stops previous playback. A second call with the same sound adjusts the volume without restarting it.

@sl-slua/global/ll.PlaySoundSlave.documentation: Plays the attached sound once at volume, synchronized to the next loop point of the most audible active Sync Master.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Pow.documentation: Returns a float representing base raised to the power exponent. Returns 0 and triggers a Math Error for imaginary results.

@sl-slua/global/ll.PreloadSound.documentation: Causes nearby viewers in range to preload the specified sound from the object's inventory to prevent playback delays.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Pursue.documentation: Directs a pathfinding character to pursue and chase target, configured by the parameters specified in options.

@sl-slua/global/ll.PushObject.documentation: Applies physical impulse (force) and ang_impulse (rotational force) to the specified target avatar or object.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ReadKeyValue.documentation: Starts an asynchronous transaction to read the value associated with key k in the experience. Returns a key query handle for the dataserver event. Fails with XP_ERROR_KEY_NOT_FOUND if the key does not exist.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RefreshPrimURL.documentation: Legacy function intended to reload the web page displayed on the prim's faces (currently non-functional).

@sl-slua/global/ll.RegionSay.documentation: Broadcasts the message msg on channel to the entire region (heard by any script listening on that channel; channel 0 is not permitted).

@sl-slua/global/ll.RegionSayTo.documentation: Sends the message msg on channel privately to the targeted avatar or object (if within the region). If target is an avatar and channel is non-zero, the message can also be heard by any attachments worn by the avatar.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ReleaseCamera.documentation: Deprecated. Intended to return camera control back to the avatar (use llClearCameraParams instead).

@sl-slua/global/ll.ReleaseControls.documentation: Stops taking inputs (previously acquired via llTakeControls) from the avatar, dequeuing any remaining control events and revoking the PERMISSION_TAKE_CONTROLS permission.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ReleaseURL.documentation: Releases the specified url (previously obtained via llRequestURL), rendering it no longer usable.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RemoteDataReply.documentation: Deprecated. Sends an XML-RPC reply on channel to message_id with payload string sdata and integer idata.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RemoteDataSetRegion.documentation: Deprecated. Used with XML-RPC to reregister remote data channels if the object moves to another region.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RemoteLoadScriptPin.documentation: Copies the script name into target, setting it running (if running is TRUE) with the start_param, provided the script owner has modify permissions on target and target's PIN matches pin (set via llSetRemoteScriptAccessPin).

@sl-slua/global/ll.RemoveFromLandBanList.documentation: Removes the specified avatar from the land parcel's ban list.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RemoveFromLandPassLis.documentation: Removes the specified avatar from the land parcel's pass/access list.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RemoveInventory.documentation: Permanently deletes the named inventory item from the prim's inventory.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RemoveVehicleFlags.documentation: Disables the specified vehicle flags (sets them to FALSE) using the bitwise mask flags.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ReplaceAgentEnvironme.documentation: Replaces the region and parcel environment seen by the specified agent_id as part of an experience, transitioning the settings over transition seconds. Passing NULL_KEY or an empty string for environment restores defaults.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ReplaceEnvironment.documentation: Replaces the environment on the parcel containing position (or the entire region if position is <-1.0, -1.0, -1.0>) for the specified track_no. Modifies day_length and day_offset if specified. Requires edit permissions on the parcel or estate management rights.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ReplaceSubString.documentation: Returns a new string representing src with count occurrences of pattern replaced by replacement_pattern. Setting count to 0 replaces all occurrences; positive counts process left-to-right, while negative counts process right-to-left.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RequestAgentData.documentation: Asynchronously requests the specified data category (DATA_*) about the agent id. Triggers a dataserver event with the results and returns a key query handle.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RequestDisplayName.documentation: Asynchronously requests the display name of the agent specified by id, triggering a dataserver event with the results. The agent does not need to be online or in the region. Returns a key query handle.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RequestExperiencePerm.documentation: Requests permission from the specified agent to participate in the experience. These permissions are persistent and apply grid-wide across all scripts in the experience, automatically triggering experience_permissions or experience_permissions_denied.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RequestInventoryData.documentation: Asynchronously requests data for the inventory item specified by name, triggering a dataserver event. Currently, only landmark items are supported (which return local region coordinates). Returns a key query handle.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RequestPermissions.documentation: Requests permissions (a bitfield specified by permissions) from the agent in the same region, calling run_time_permissions if granted. This call does not pause script execution.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RequestSecureURL.documentation: Asynchronously requests one secure HTTPS (SSL, port 12043) URL for use by this object, triggering an http_request event. Returns a key query handle.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RequestSimulatorData.documentation: Asynchronously requests data (using a DATA_SIM_* constant) about the region. Triggers a dataserver event and returns a key query handle.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RequestURL.documentation: Asynchronously requests one HTTP URL for use by this script, triggering an http_request event. Returns a key query handle.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RequestUserKey.documentation: Asynchronously requests the Agent ID key (UUID) for the agent specified by their current or historical username, returning NULL_KEY if not found. Returns a key query handle for the dataserver event.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RequestUsername.documentation: Asynchronously requests the unique single-word username of the agent identified by id, triggering a dataserver event. The agent does not need to be online or in the region. Returns a key query handle.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ResetAnimationOverrid.documentation: Resets the animation override for anim_state to its default value (use 'ALL' to reset all states). Requires the PERMISSION_OVERRIDE_ANIMATIONS permission.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ResetLandBanList.documentation: Removes all blocked residents from the land parcel's ban list.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ResetLandPassList.documentation: Removes all residents from the land parcel's access/pass list.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ResetOtherScript.documentation: Resets the script name located in the prim's inventory.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ReturnObjectsByID.documentation: Returns objects specified by the list of UUIDs objects to their owners. Requires the PERMISSION_RETURN_OBJECTS permission, and the script owner must own the parcel or be an estate manager/region owner.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ReturnObjectsByOwner.documentation: Returns objects owned by owner within the specified scope (parcel, parcel owner, or region). Requires the PERMISSION_RETURN_OBJECTS permission, and the script owner must own the parcel or be an estate manager/region owner.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RezAtRoot.documentation: Instantiates the inventory object at position moving at velocity, rotated to rot with its root prim centered exactly on position, passing param as the on_rez start parameter.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RezObject.documentation: Instantiates the inventory object at pos with velocity vel and rotation rot, passing param as the on_rez start parameter. The vel parameter is ignored if the rezzed object is non-physical.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RezObjectWithParams.documentation: Instantiates the inventory object (defaulting to the rezzing prim's position unless REZ_POS is specified) using the initial set of parameters specified in params. Returns the key of the rezzed object, or a blank key on failure.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Rot2Angle.documentation: Returns a float representing the rotation angle of rot.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Rot2Axis.documentation: Returns a vector representing the rotation axis of rot.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Rot2Euler.documentation: Returns a vector representing the Euler rotation (roll, pitch, yaw) of quat, with each component expressed in radians.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Rot2Fwd.documentation: Returns a unit vector pointing in the local positive X direction (forward) relative to the parent (root prim or region) defined by rotation q.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Rot2Left.documentation: Returns a unit vector pointing in the local positive Y direction (left) relative to the parent (root prim or region) defined by rotation q.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Rot2Up.documentation: Returns a unit vector pointing in the local positive Z direction (up) relative to the parent (root prim or region) defined by rotation q.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RotBetween.documentation: Returns a rotation representing the shortest path rotation from vector start to vector end.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RotLookAt.documentation: Causes the object to smoothly rotate to target_direction with a force defined by strength and damping. A strength of 0.0 cancels the rotation target. Rotation is maintained until stopped with llStopLookAt.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RotTarget.documentation: Registers the rotation rot with a leeway tolerance error (in radians) as a target, triggering at_rot_target and not_at_rot_target events. Returns an integer handle to unregister the target via llRotTargetRemove.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RotTargetRemove.documentation: Removes the rotational target specified by the integer handle registered with llRotTarget.

@sl-slua/global/ll.RotateTexture.documentation: Sets the texture rotation of face to the specified angle (in radians). If face is ALL_SIDES, rotates the texture on all faces.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Round.documentation: Returns the integer that float val is closest to.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SHA1String.documentation: Returns a string of 40 hex characters representing the SHA-1 security hash of src.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SHA256String.documentation: Returns a string of 64 hex characters representing the SHA-256 security hash of src.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SameGroup.documentation: Returns TRUE if the agent or object specified by uuid is in the same region (simulator) and shares the same active group as the prim containing the script; returns FALSE otherwise.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Say.documentation: Says the text message msg on the specified channel. The message can be heard up to a 20m radius. Channels other than PUBLIC_CHANNEL (0) and DEBUG_CHANNEL (2147483647) are not visible to avatars and can be used for script-to-script communication.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ScaleByFactor.documentation: Attempts to uniformly resize the entire object by scaling_factor, maintaining size-position ratios of the prims. Fails if the linkset is physical, a pathfinding character, in keyframed motion, would exceed prim scale/linkability limits, or would overflow parcel capacity.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ScaleTexture.documentation: Sets the diffuse texture horizontal u and vertical v scales (repeats) on the specified face of the prim. Setting face to ALL_SIDES updates all sides. Negative scale values flip the texture.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ScriptDanger.documentation: Returns TRUE if the vector position pos is over public land, sandbox land, land restricting edit/build permissions, or land that disables outside scripts.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ScriptProfiler.documentation: Enables or disables the script's profiling state using flags (supports PROFILE_SCRIPT_MEMORY on Mono, or PROFILE_NONE). Active profiling can significantly reduce script performance.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SendRemoteData.documentation: Deprecated. Sends an XML-RPC request to dest on channel, containing the channel ID as a string, integer idata, and string sdata. Returns a key representing the message_id.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Sensor.documentation: Performs a single scan from the prim's forward vector for name and id of type within radius meters and arc radians. Results trigger a sensor or no_sensor event. Passing empty filters (blank name, 0 type, or NULL_KEY id) disables that filter.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SensorRemove.documentation: Removes the periodic sensor previously configured by llSensorRepeat.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SensorRepeat.documentation: Sets up a repeating periodic scan every rate seconds for name and id of type within radius meters and arc radians of the forward vector. Results trigger sensor or no_sensor events.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetAgentEnvironment.documentation: Sets an individual agent's environmental settings using the attributes in params over a duration of transition seconds. Must be used as part of an experience; passing an empty list removes overrides.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetAgentRot.documentation: Sets the rotation of the avatar to rot, controlled by flags.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetAlpha.documentation: Sets the diffuse texture alpha (opacity) of face. If face is ALL_SIDES, applies to all faces. Values are clamped between 0.1 and 1.0 (where 1.0 is fully opaque).

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetAngularVelocity.documentation: Sets the angular velocity of a physical object to initial_omega (mass-independent). If local is TRUE, applied in local coordinates; if FALSE, applied in global coordinates. Has no effect on non-physical objects.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetAnimationOverride.documentation: Overrides the default animation for anim_state with anim (which must be in the object's inventory or a built-in animation). Requires the PERMISSION_OVERRIDE_ANIMATIONS permission.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetBuoyancy.documentation: Sets the buoyancy of a physical object (requires physics to be enabled). A value of 0.0 offers no buoyancy, < 1.0 sinks, 1.0 counteracts gravity, and > 1.0 rises.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetCameraAtOffset.documentation: Sets the target offset vector (in local coordinates) that a seated avatar's camera will look at.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetCameraEyeOffset.documentation: Sets the eye offset vector (in local coordinates) where a seated avatar's camera is positioned.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetCameraParams.documentation: Sets multiple camera parameters simultaneously using the list of rules. Requires the PERMISSION_CONTROL_CAMERA runtime permission.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetClickAction.documentation: Sets the action (a CLICK_ACTION_* flag) performed when an avatar left-clicks the prim.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetColor.documentation: Sets the Blinn-Phong diffuse RGB color of face. If face is ALL_SIDES, applies the color to all faces.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetContentType.documentation: Sets the 'Content-Type' header of subsequent HTTP server responses (via llHTTPResponse) for request_id using the specified content_type (a CONTENT_TYPE_* constant).

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetDamage.documentation: Sets the amount of damage delivered when this object hits an avatar. The object is immediately destroyed upon inflicting damage, and no collision event is triggered.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetEnvironment.documentation: Overrides the environmental settings at position for a parcel (or region if position is <-1.0, -1.0, z>) using the parameters in params. Passing an empty params list removes previous overrides.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetForce.documentation: Applies a constant linear force to a physical object. If local is TRUE, force is applied relative to local coordinates; if FALSE, applied relative to region coordinates.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetForceAndTorque.documentation: Sets both the constant linear force and constant torque acting on a physical object. If local is TRUE, forces are applied in local coordinates; if FALSE, in global coordinates.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetGroundTexture.documentation: Changes the painted terrain textures on the region based on changes. The script owner must have estate management rights. Returns an integer status.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetHoverHeight.documentation: Critically damps the physical object's vertical movement to hover at height (above ground, or above water if water is TRUE) in tau seconds. Do not use with vehicles; call llStopHover to cancel.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetInventoryPermMask.documentation: Sets the specified permission category of the inventory item to the value permissions mask.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetKeyframedMotion.documentation: Smoothly moves a non-physical object between the positions, orientations, and times specified in the keyframes list, configured via options. Collisions with keyframed objects are ignored. An empty keyframes list terminates the motion.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetLinkAlpha.documentation: Sets the Blinn-Phong alpha (transparency) of face on the linked prim link.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetLinkCamera.documentation: Sets the camera eye position offset eye and looking-at position offset at for avatars who sit on the linked prim link.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetLinkColor.documentation: Sets the Blinn-Phong diffuse RGB color of face on the linked prim link.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetLinkGLTFOverrides.documentation: Sets or removes individual GLTF override parameters specified by params on face of the linked prim link.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetLinkMedia.documentation: Sets the media parameters specified by params on face of the linked prim link without a script delay. Returns an integer STATUS_* flag detailing success or failure.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetLinkPrimitiveParam.documentation: Deprecated (use llSetLinkPrimitiveParamsFast instead). Sets primitive parameters for the linked prim link according to rules.
Sets primitive parameters for the linked prim link according to rules with no built-in script sleep delay.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetLinkRenderMaterial.documentation: Applies material (UUID or inventory name) to face of the linked prim link. Note: This clears most PRIM_GLTF_* properties on the face except for repeats, offsets, and rotation.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetLinkSitFlags.documentation: Sets the sit target flags for the linked prim link inside the linkset.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetLinkTexture.documentation: Applies texture (UUID or inventory name) to face of the linked prim link.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetLinkTextureAnim.documentation: Animates the texture on face of the linked prim link by setting the scale and offset according to mode. Parameters sizex/sizey define frames, start defines the start frame/angle, length defines duration, and rate defines playback speed.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetLocalRot.documentation: Sets the rotation of a child prim relative to its root prim using rot.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetObjectDesc.documentation: Sets the description of the prim containing the script to description (limited to 127 characters).

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetObjectName.documentation: Sets the name of the prim containing the script to name.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetObjectPermMask.documentation: Sets the specified permission mask category to value on the root object containing the script.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetParcelForSale.documentation: Sets the parcel the object is on for sale. If ForSale is TRUE, puts the land up for sale using Options (price, buyer, objects included). Setting ForSale to FALSE removes the parcel from sale. Requires parcel ownership and the PERMISSION_PRIVILEGED_LAND_ACCESS permission. Returns an error code or 0 if successful.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetParcelMusicURL.documentation: Sets the streaming audio (music) URL for the parcel containing the object. The object owner must match the landowner or land group.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetPayPrice.documentation: Suggests default amounts for the pay text input field price and the four payment dialog quick_pay_buttons when an avatar pays this object.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetPhysicsMaterial.documentation: Configures the physical characteristics of an object. The mask bitfield specifies which of the other parameters (gravity_multiplier, restitution, friction, or density) should be applied to the object.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetPos.documentation: Moves the non-physical object or prim toward the vector pos (up to 10m). If called in a child prim, pos is treated as root-relative; if called from the root prim, the entire object is moved.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetPrimMediaParams.documentation: Sets the media parameters specified by params on the designated face of the prim. Returns an integer STATUS_* flag detailing success or failure.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetPrimURL.documentation: Deprecated (use llSetPrimMediaParams instead). Updates the URL displayed on the prim's faces.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetPrimitiveParams.documentation: Deprecated (use llSetLinkPrimitiveParamsFast instead). Sets the prim's attributes according to rules.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetRegionPos.documentation: Tries to move the entire object so that its root prim is within 0.1m of the vector position (underground positions are set to ground level). Returns TRUE on success or FALSE on failure.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetRemoteScriptAccess.documentation: Sets the prim's remote script access PIN to pin (a non-zero value enables loading via llRemoteLoadScriptPin, while zero disables it).

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetRenderMaterial.documentation: Applies material (UUID or inventory name) to face of the prim. Note: This clears most PRIM_GLTF_* properties on the face except for repeats, offsets, and rotation.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetRot.documentation: Sets the rotation of the prim to rot. If in a child prim, rot is treated as root-relative; if in the root prim of a non-physical object, rotates the entire object.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetScale.documentation: Sets the physical scale (dimensions) of the prim containing the script to size.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetScriptState.documentation: Sets the running state of the script name in the prim's inventory. If running is TRUE, the script is enabled; if FALSE, it is disabled.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetSitText.documentation: Displays the string text instead of 'Sit' (or 'Sit Here') in the viewer's right-click context menu.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetSoundQueueing.documentation: Sets whether attached sounds wait for the current sound to end before playing (enables queuing if queue is TRUE, disables if FALSE). The queue is one level deep.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetSoundRadius.documentation: Limits the audibility radius of attached and triggered scripted sounds to distance radius.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetStatus.documentation: Sets the object status attributes specified by status to value.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetText.documentation: Displays floating text above the prim with the specified color vector and transparency alpha.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetTexture.documentation: Applies the Blinn-Phong diffuse texture to face of the prim.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetTextureAnim.documentation: Animates the texture on face of the prim by setting its scale and offset. mode defines options, sizex/sizey define frames, start defines the start frame/angle, length defines duration, and rate defines playback speed.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetTorque.documentation: Applies a constant torque rotational force to a physical object. If local is TRUE, torque is applied in local coordinates; if FALSE, applied in global coordinates.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetTouchText.documentation: Displays the string text instead of 'Touch' in the right-click context menu.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetVehicleFlags.documentation: Enables the vehicle flags specified in the Flags bitmask.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetVehicleFloatParam.documentation: Sets the specified vehicle float parameter param to value.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetVehicleRotationPar.documentation: Sets the specified vehicle rotation parameter param to rot.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetVehicleType.documentation: Sets the vehicle physics preset type to one of the default vehicle types.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetVehicleVectorParam.documentation: Sets the specified vehicle vector parameter param to vec.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SetVelocity.documentation: Sets the linear velocity of a physical object to velocity. If local is TRUE, velocity is treated as a local directional vector; if FALSE, as a global region directional vector. Has no effect on non-physical objects.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Shout.documentation: Shouts the text message msg on the specified channel. The message can be heard up to a 100m radius. All channels other than PUBLIC_CHANNEL (0) and DEBUG_CHANNEL (2147483647) are not sent to avatars and are used to communicate with scripts.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SignRSA.documentation: Returns the Base64-encoded RSA signature of msg using the PEM-formatted private_key and the specified digest algorithm (sha1, sha224, sha256, sha384, or sha512). Can be paired with llVerifyRSA to pass verifiable messages.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Sin.documentation: Returns a float representing the sine of theta.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SitOnLink.documentation: Forces the avatar specified by agent_id (who must be participating in the experience) to sit on the sit target of the prim indicated by link. If occupied, searches down the linkset for an available sit target. Returns an integer.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SitTarget.documentation: Sets the sit target position (offset) and rotation (rot) relative to the prim's position and orientation. Clears the sit target if offset is ZERO_VECTOR.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Sleep.documentation: Puts the script to sleep for sec seconds (at least until the next server-frame, ~0.02222 seconds). The script is inactive during this time. If sec is 0.0 or less, the script does not sleep.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Sound.documentation: Deprecated (use llPlaySound instead). Plays the specified sound at volume, with options to loop or queue the sound.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SoundPreload.documentation: Deprecated (use llPreloadSound instead). Preloads the specified sound on viewers within range.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Sqrt.documentation: Returns a float representing the square root of the positive value val. Triggers a math runtime error if val is less than 0.0 (imaginary results).

@sl-slua/global/ll.StartAnimation.documentation: Starts the animation anim (inventory or built-in) on the avatar who granted the script the PERMISSION_TRIGGER_ANIMATION permission (automatically granted for attached or sat-on objects).

@sl-slua/global/ll.StartObjectAnimation.documentation: Starts the specified animation anim (inventory or built-in) on the rigged mesh object associated with the current script.

@sl-slua/global/ll.StopAnimation.documentation: Stops the specified animation anim (inventory, built-in, or UUID) on the avatar who granted the script the PERMISSION_TRIGGER_ANIMATION permission (automatically granted for attached or sat-on objects).

@sl-slua/global/ll.StopHover.documentation: Stops the hover behavior (such as that initiated by llSetHoverHeight).

@sl-slua/global/ll.StopLookAt.documentation: Stops causing the object to look at or point toward a target (canceling llLookAt or llRotLookAt).

@sl-slua/global/ll.StopMoveToTarget.documentation: Stops the critically damped movement of the object toward a target (canceling llMoveToTarget). Use llStopLookAt to stop rotational tracking.

@sl-slua/global/ll.StopObjectAnimation.documentation: Stops the specified animation anim (inventory, built-in, or UUID) on the rigged mesh object associated with the current script.

@sl-slua/global/ll.StopSound.documentation: Stops playback of the currently playing attached sound.

@sl-slua/global/ll.StringLength.documentation: Returns an integer representing the number of characters in the string str (excluding the null terminator).

@sl-slua/global/ll.StringToBase64.documentation: Returns the Base64 representation string of str, interpreting it as a UTF-8 byte sequence.

@sl-slua/global/ll.StringTrim.documentation: Returns a copy of the string src with leading, trailing, or both types of whitespace (including spaces, tabs, and line feeds) eliminated, according to the specified trim type.

@sl-slua/global/ll.SubStringIndex.documentation: Returns the zero-based index of the first instance of the pattern substring inside the string source. Returns nil if not found.

@sl-slua/global/ll.TakeCamera.documentation: Deprecated (use llSetCameraParams instead). Formerly used to take control of the agent's camera.

@sl-slua/global/ll.TakeControls.documentation: Intercepts inputs (keyboard/mouse clicks) from the agent, specifically those specified by controls. The boolean accept determines if events are generated, and pass_on determines if inputs also perform their default functions. Requires the PERMISSION_TAKE_CONTROLS runtime permission.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Tan.documentation: Returns a float representing the tangent of theta.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Target.documentation: Registers a positional target at position with a leeway radius range. This triggers at_target and not_at_target events. Returns an integer handle to unregister the target via llTargetRemove.

@sl-slua/global/ll.TargetOmega.documentation: Applies a smooth client-side rotation around the local axis at a rate equal to spinrate multiplied by the magnitude of axis (in radians per second) with a force defined by gain. Set spinrate to 0.0 to cancel.

@sl-slua/global/ll.TargetRemove.documentation: Removes the positional target specified by the integer handle registered with llTarget.

@sl-slua/global/ll.TargetedEmail.documentation: Sends an email containing subject and message to the target (which can designate the owner or creator of the object).

@sl-slua/global/ll.TeleportAgent.documentation: Teleports the owning agent (who must grant PERMISSION_TELEPORT) to a landmark in the object's inventory. If landmark is empty, teleports them to position within the current region. Upon arrival, the agent is turned to face look_at. Can only teleport the owner.

@sl-slua/global/ll.TeleportAgentGlobalCo.documentation: Teleports the owning agent (who must grant PERMISSION_TELEPORT) to region_coordinates within a target region specified by global_coordinates. Upon landing, the agent faces the direction look_at. Can only teleport the owner.

@sl-slua/global/ll.TeleportAgentHome.documentation: Teleports the avatar (who must be standing on land owned by the script owner) directly to their designated home location without warning (similar to a God Summons).

@sl-slua/global/ll.TextBox.documentation: Opens an input text box dialog displaying message to the avatar. Submitting text chats the input string on channel as if said by the avatar.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ToLower.documentation: Returns a copy of the string src converted entirely to lowercase.

@sl-slua/global/ll.ToUpper.documentation: Returns a copy of the string src converted entirely to uppercase.

@sl-slua/global/ll.TransferLindenDollars.documentation: Transfers amount of L$ from the script owner to the destination avatar, requiring the PERMISSION_DEBIT permission. Returns a key query handle matching the resulting transaction_result event.

@sl-slua/global/ll.TransferOwnership.documentation: Transfers ownership of the object (or a copy of it, depending on flags) to the avatar agent_id. Returns an integer indicating the success or failure of the transfer.

@sl-slua/global/ll.TriggerSound.documentation: Plays specified sound once at volume, centered at the object's current position but not attached (does not move with the object and cannot be stopped or adjusted). Does not affect attached sounds.

@sl-slua/global/ll.TriggerSoundLimited.documentation: Plays the specified sound once at volume, centered at the object but not attached, restricted to the axis-aligned bounding box defined by the coordinates top_north_east and bottom_south_west.

@sl-slua/global/ll.UnSit.documentation: Forces the agent specified by id to stand up if they are sitting on the object containing the script, or are currently over land owned by the object's owner.

@sl-slua/global/ll.UnescapeURL.documentation: Returns a string representing the unescaped/decoded version of url, replacing '%20' with spaces and decoding raw UTF-8 characters.

@sl-slua/global/ll.UpdateCharacter.documentation: Updates settings for a pathfinding character using the parameters specified in options.

@sl-slua/global/ll.UpdateKeyValue.documentation: Starts an asynchronous transaction to update the key k to value v inside the experience datastore. If checked is TRUE, the update fails with XP_ERROR_RETRY_UPDATE unless the existing value matches original_value.

@sl-slua/global/ll.VecDist.documentation: Returns a float representing the undirected, non-negative distance between vectors vec_a and vec_b.

@sl-slua/global/ll.VecMag.documentation: Returns a float representing the magnitude (geometric length) of the vector vec.

@sl-slua/global/ll.VecNorm.documentation: Returns a normalized unit vector sharing the same direction as vec.

@sl-slua/global/ll.VerifyRSA.documentation: Returns TRUE if the Base64-formatted signature is verified as valid for the message msg when using the digest algorithm and public_key. Returns FALSE otherwise.

@sl-slua/global/ll.VolumeDetect.documentation: If detect is TRUE, enables VolumeDetect (object becomes phantom and physical objects/avatars can pass through it). Triggers collision_start on initial intersection and collision_end when intersection stops (standard collision events are suppressed while intersecting).

@sl-slua/global/ll.WanderWithin.documentation: Directs a pathfinding character to wander around a central coordinate origin, restricted within the bounding distance limits of dist and configured by options.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Water.documentation: Returns a float representing the water height directly below the prim's position offset by the vector offset.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Whisper.documentation: Whispers the text message msg on the specified channel. The message can be heard up to a 10m radius. All channels other than PUBLIC_CHANNEL (0) and DEBUG_CHANNEL (2147483647) are not sent to avatars and are used to communicate with scripts.

@sl-slua/global/ll.Wind.documentation: Returns a vector representing the wind velocity at the prim's position offset by the vector offset.

@sl-slua/global/ll.WorldPosToHUD.documentation: Returns the local position vector that places the center of the HUD object directly over the world coordinate world_pos as viewed by the current camera. Requires the PERMISSION_TRACK_CAMERA runtime permission.

@sl-slua/global/ll.XorBase64.documentation: Correctly performs a bitwise exclusive OR (XOR) on Base64 strings str1 and str2, returning the result as a Base64 string. The string str2 repeats if it is shorter than str1.

@sl-slua/global/ll.XorBase64Strings.documentation: Deprecated (use llXorBase64 instead). Retained for backwards compatibility. Incorrectly performs a bitwise exclusive OR (XOR) on Base64 strings str1 and str2.

@sl-slua/global/ll.XorBase64StringsCorre.documentation: Deprecated (use llXorBase64 instead). Correctly performs (unless nulls are present) a bitwise exclusive OR (XOR) on Base64 strings str1 and str2.

@sl-slua/global/ll.sRGB2Linear.documentation: Returns a vector representing the conversion of the color srgb from the sRGB colorspace into the linear RGB colorspace.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.documentation: Like ll, but exactly matches LSL semantics.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Abs.documentation: Returns an integer representing the absolute (positive) value of val.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Acos.documentation: Returns a float representing the arc-cosine of val in radians.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.AddToLandBanLis.documentation: Adds the avatar to the parcel ban list for the specified number of hours. A value of 0 hours adds the avatar indefinitely. Banned users teleporting to the parcel are redirected to a neighboring parcel; the minimum accepted duration is 0.01 hours (approximately 36 seconds).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.AddToLandPassLi.documentation: Adds the avatar to the land pass list for the specified number of hours (or indefinitely if hours is 0).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.AdjustDamage.documentation: (Index semantics) Modifies the amount of damage applied by the current on_damage event after it completes processing, specified by the damage event index number.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.AdjustSoundVolu.documentation: Adjusts the volume of the currently playing attached sound (has no effect on sounds started with llTriggerSound).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.AgentInExperien.documentation: Returns TRUE if the specified agent is in the experience and the experience can run in the current region/location; returns FALSE otherwise.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.AllowInventoryD.documentation: If add is TRUE, allows users without object modify permissions to drop inventory items into the prim. If FALSE, restricts inventory dropping to users with modify permissions.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.AngleBetween.documentation: Returns a float representing the angle in radians between rotations a and b.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ApplyImpulse.documentation: Applies a linear impulse (momentum) to a physical object. If local is TRUE, the impulse is applied in local coordinates; otherwise, it is applied in global region coordinates.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ApplyRotational.documentation: Applies a rotational impulse (force) to a physical object. If local is TRUE, the rotational impulse is applied in local coordinates; otherwise, it is applied in global region coordinates.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Asin.documentation: Returns a float representing the arc-sine of val in radians.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Atan2.documentation: Returns a float representing the arctangent2 of y and x.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.AttachToAvatar.documentation: Attaches the object to the avatar who has granted the PERMISSION_ATTACH permission. Takes the object into the user's inventory and attaches it at attach_point.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.AttachToAvatarT.documentation: Attaches the object temporarily to an avatar who has granted the PERMISSION_ATTACH permission. No permanent inventory is created, and the object disappears on detach or disconnect. Can be used on non-owners (changing ownership to the wearer).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.AvatarOnLinkSit.documentation: Returns the UUID of the avatar seated on the specified link's sit target, or NULL_KEY if no avatar is sitting there.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.AvatarOnSitTarg.documentation: Returns the UUID of the avatar seated on the prim's sit target (defined via llSitTarget), or NULL_KEY if no avatar is sitting there or the prim lacks a sit target.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Axes2Rot.documentation: Returns the rotation defined by the coordinate axes fwd, left, and up.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.AxisAngle2Rot.documentation: Returns the rotation representing a generated angle (in radians) about the specified axis.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Base64ToInteger.documentation: Returns an integer representing the Base64-decoded big-endian value of str. Returns zero if str is longer than 8 characters; the return value is unpredictable if str contains fewer than 6 characters.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Base64ToString.documentation: Decodes the Base64-encoded string str into a conventional string, interpreting the bytes as a UTF-8 character sequence. Unprintable characters are converted to question marks.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.BreakAllLinks.documentation: Delinks all prims in the linkset. Requires the PERMISSION_CHANGE_LINKS runtime permission, which must be requested and granted by the owner.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.BreakLink.documentation: Delinks the prim specified by the link number link. Requires the PERMISSION_CHANGE_LINKS runtime permission.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.CSV2List.documentation: Parses the comma-separated string src and returns it as a list.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.CastRay.documentation: Casts a ray into the physics world from start to end and reports collision data for intersections with objects based on options. Returns a list of strided values [UUID_1, {link_number_1}, hit_position_1, {hit_normal_1}, ..., status_code]. A negative status_code indicates an error; otherwise, it represents the number of hits.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Ceil.documentation: Returns the smallest integer value greater than or equal to val (rounded toward positive infinity).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Char.documentation: Constructs and returns a single-character string representing the supplied Unicode value val.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ClearCameraPara.documentation: Resets all camera parameters to default values and turns off scripted camera control. Requires the PERMISSION_CONTROL_CAMERA runtime permission (automatically granted for attached or sat-on objects).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ClearLinkMedia.documentation: Deletes the media and clears all parameters from the given face on the linked prim. Returns an integer STATUS_* flag detailing the success or failure of the operation.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ClearPrimMedia.documentation: Deletes the media and clears all parameters from the specified face. Returns an integer STATUS_* flag detailing the success or failure of the operation.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.CloseRemoteData.documentation: Deprecated. Closes the specified XML-RPC channel.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Cloud.documentation: Returns a float representing the cloud density at the prim's position offset by the vector offset.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.CollisionFilter.documentation: Sets the collision filter, either exclusively or inclusively. If accept is TRUE, only collisions matching name and id are processed; if FALSE, matches are excluded. Pass an empty string or NULL_KEY to name or id to skip filtering on that parameter.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.CollisionSound.documentation: Suppresses default collision sounds and replaces default impact sounds with impact_sound at the volume level specified by impact_volume. Supply an empty string to only suppress collision sounds.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.CollisionSprite.documentation: Suppresses default collision sprites and replaces them with impact_sprite (which must be in the prim's inventory). Supply an empty string to only suppress collision sprites.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ComputeHash.documentation: Returns a hex-encoded hash digest string of message using the specified cryptographic algorithm.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Cos.documentation: Returns a float representing the cosine of theta.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.CreateCharacter.documentation: Converts the linkset containing the script into a pathfinding character entity (required to use pathfinding functions) using the specified options.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.CreateKeyValue.documentation: Starts an asynchronous transaction to create a key-value pair (k and v) associated with the script's experience. Returns a key query handle for the dataserver event. Fails with XP_ERROR_STORAGE_EXCEPTION if the key already exists.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.CreateLink.documentation: Attempts to link the object containing the script with target. Requires the PERMISSION_CHANGE_LINKS runtime permission.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Damage.documentation: Generates a damage event delivering the specified amount of damage and damage_type to the targeted avatar or task in the same region.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DataSizeKeyValu.documentation: Starts an asynchronous transaction to request the used and total data storage allocated for the experience. Returns a key query handle for the dataserver event.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DeleteCharacter.documentation: Converts the linkset back to a standard physical object, removing all pathfinding properties.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DeleteKeyValue.documentation: Starts an asynchronous transaction to delete the key-value pair associated with key k in the experience. Returns a key query handle for the dataserver event.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DeleteSubList.documentation: Returns a copy of the list src with the slice from start to end (inclusive) removed. Negative indices count backward from the end of the list. If start is greater than end, the deletion excludes the specified range.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DeleteSubString.documentation: Returns a copy of the string src with the characters from start to end (inclusive) removed. Negative indices count backward from the end of the string. If start is greater than end, the deletion excludes the specified range.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DerezObject.documentation: Derezzes (deletes or returns) a targeted object in the region previously rezzed by a script in this linkset, returning TRUE on success or FALSE on failure.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DetachFromAvata.documentation: Detaches the object containing the script from the avatar. Requires the PERMISSION_ATTACH runtime permission (automatically granted to attached objects). Note that the detached object is completely removed from the region and not dropped on the ground.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DetectedDamage.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns a list containing pending damage information for the event specified by number, including the current damage, the damage type, and the original damage delivered.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DetectedGrab.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns a vector representing the grab offset of the user touching the object. Only works in touch events and returns <0.0, 0.0, 0.0> if number is not a valid index.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DetectedGroup.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns TRUE if the detected object or avatar specified by number has the same active group as the prim containing the script. Returns FALSE if the group is not active or if they are not in the group.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DetectedKey.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns the key (UUID) of the detected object or avatar specified by number, or NULL_KEY if number is not a valid index.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DetectedLinkNum.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns the link number (integer) of the triggered event (touches and collisions only) specified by number. Returns 0 for non-linked objects, 1 for the root prim, and 2+ for child prims. Returns 0 if not supported by the event.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DetectedName.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns a string representing the name of the detected object or avatar specified by item. Returns an empty string if item is not a valid index.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DetectedOwner.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns the key (UUID) of the owner of the detected object specified by number. Returns an invalid key if number is not a valid index.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DetectedPos.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns the vector position (in region coordinates) of the detected object or avatar specified by number, or <0.0, 0.0, 0.0> if number is not a valid index.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DetectedRezzer.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns the key (UUID) of the object or avatar that rezzed the detected object specified by number.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DetectedRot.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns the rotation of the detected object or avatar specified by number, or <0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0> if number is not a valid offset index.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DetectedTouchBi.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns the surface binormal vector (tangent to the surface, pointing along the positive T (V) direction of tangent space) at the touched location specified by index. Can be used with llDetectedTouchNormal to determine the tangent space.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DetectedTouchFa.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns the integer index of the face clicked by the avatar in the touch event specified by index.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DetectedTouchNo.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns the surface normal vector (perpendicular to the surface) at the touched location specified by index. Can be used with llDetectedTouchBinormal to determine the tangent space.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DetectedTouchPo.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns the vector position where the object was touched (specified by index) in region coordinates, or in screen-space coordinates if the object is attached as a HUD.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DetectedTouchST.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns the surface coordinates (<s, t, 0.0>) where the prim was touched, specified by index. X and Y contain the horizontal (s) and vertical (t) face coordinates, typically in the interval [0.0, 1.0]. Returns TOUCH_INVALID_TEXCOORD if coordinates cannot be determined.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DetectedTouchUV.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns the texture coordinates (<u, v, 0.0>) where the prim was touched, specified by index. X and Y contain the horizontal (u) and vertical (v) texture coordinates, typically in the interval [0.0, 1.0] (affected by repeats and rotation). Returns TOUCH_INVALID_TEXCOORD if coordinates cannot be determined.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DetectedType.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns an integer bitfield representing the types (AGENT, ACTIVE, PASSIVE, or SCRIPTED) of the detected object or avatar specified by number. Returns 0 if number is not a valid index.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DetectedVel.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns the vector velocity of the detected object or avatar specified by number, or <0.0, 0.0, 0.0> if number is not a valid offset index.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Dialog.documentation: Shows a dialog box on the screen of the avatar specified by avatar, displaying message along with up to 12 choice buttons. Clicking a button chats its label on channel.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Die.documentation: Deletes the entire object containing the script (the object does not go to inventory). Use llBreakLink first to delete only a single prim.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.DumpList2String.documentation: Returns a string that is the list src converted to a single string, with separator placed between each entry.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.EdgeOfWorld.documentation: Checks if the border reached along the vector dir from the vector pos is the edge of the world (i.e., has no neighboring simulator). Returns TRUE if it hits the edge of the world, or FALSE if there is a neighboring simulator.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.EjectFromLand.documentation: Ejects the specified avatar from land/parcels owned by the object's owner (group or resident).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Email.documentation: Sends an email to address with subject and message.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.EscapeURL.documentation: Returns a string representing the escaped/encoded version of url, replacing spaces with '%20' and non-alphanumeric characters with their '%xx' hexadecimal UTF-8 equivalent.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Euler2Rot.documentation: Returns the rotation representation of the Euler angles vector v.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Evade.documentation: Directs a pathfinding character to evade target, attempting to hide from its pursuer if a hiding spot is available (i.e., no line of sight from the character's head to the pursuer's head, and no direct path on the navmesh).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ExecCharacterCm.documentation: Sends a command (specified by command) to the pathing system with options. Currently only supports stopping pathfinding or making the character jump.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Fabs.documentation: Returns a float representing the absolute (positive) value of val.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.FindNotecardTex.documentation: Searches the text of a cached notecard for lines containing the given pattern and returns the number of matches found through a dataserver event.

(Index semantics) Synchronously searches a cached notecard name for lines containing pattern, returning a list of line and column numbers. Returns a list containing 'NAK' if the notecard is not cached, or an empty list if no matches are found.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.FleeFrom.documentation: Directs a pathfinding character to keep the specified distance from the target position vector (within the region or adjacent regions).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Floor.documentation: Returns the largest integer value less than or equal to val (rounded toward negative infinity).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ForceMouselook.documentation: Sets whether any avatar sitting on this prim is forced into mouselook mode. Setting mouselook to TRUE forces the mode; FALSE (default) allows the avatar to keep their current camera mode.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Frand.documentation: Returns a pseudo-random float in the range [0.0, mag) or (mag, 0.0] depending on the sign of mag. The value is inclusive of 0.0 but exclusive of mag.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GenerateKey.documentation: Generates and returns a unique versioned UUID key (utilizing SHA-1 hashing). Due to being versioned, it will not return NULL_KEY; however, the exact UUID version is an implementation detail that should not be relied upon.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetAccel.documentation: Returns a vector representing the acceleration of the object in the region's frame of reference.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetAgentInfo.documentation: Returns an integer bitfield containing status information about the agent specified by id (such as AGENT_FLYING, AGENT_ATTACHMENTS, AGENT_SITTING, etc.).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetAgentLanguag.documentation: Returns a string representing the language code of the preferred interface language set by the avatar.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetAgentList.documentation: Requests a list of avatar UUID keys for agents currently in the region, limited by scope. Returns a list of keys or a list containing an error message string.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetAgentSize.documentation: Returns a vector representing the estimated bounding box size of the specified avatar, or ZERO_VECTOR if they are not in the same region.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetAlpha.documentation: Returns a float representing the Blinn-Phong alpha (transparency) of face. If face is ALL_SIDES, returns the mean average of all faces.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetAndResetTime.documentation: Returns the elapsed script time in seconds as a float, then resets the script timer to zero.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetAnimation.documentation: Returns a string representing the name of the currently playing locomotion animation for the avatar specified by id.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetAnimationLis.documentation: Returns a list of keys (UUIDs) representing all active animations currently playing on the specified avatar.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetAnimationOve.documentation: Returns a string representing the name of the animation currently overriding the specified anim_state. Requires the PERMISSION_OVERRIDE_ANIMATIONS or PERMISSION_TRIGGER_ANIMATION runtime permission.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetAttached.documentation: Returns the integer attachment point (an ATTACH_* constant) that the object is attached to, or 0 if it is unattached or pending detachment.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetAttachedList.documentation: Returns a list of object keys (UUIDs) corresponding to public, visible (non-HUD) attachments worn by the specified avatar, in the order they were attached. Returns a list with an error message string on failure.
Retrieves a list of attachment object keys worn by avatar in the order they were attached, filtered by options. Returns a list containing an error message string on failure.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetBoundingBox.documentation: Returns the bounding box of object (including any linked prims) relative to its root prim in local coordinates, formatted as [ (vector) min_corner, (vector) max_corner ].

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetCameraAspect.documentation: Returns a float representing the camera's current aspect ratio (width/height) of the agent who granted PERMISSION_TRACK_CAMERA. Returns 0.0 if permissions are not granted.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetCameraFOV.documentation: Returns a float representing the camera's current field of view (FOV) in radians of the agent who granted PERMISSION_TRACK_CAMERA. Returns 0.0 if permissions are not granted.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetCameraPos.documentation: Returns a vector representing the camera's current position in region coordinates of the agent who granted PERMISSION_TRACK_CAMERA. Returns ZERO_VECTOR if permissions are not granted.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetCameraRot.documentation: Returns a rotation representing the camera's current orientation of the agent who granted PERMISSION_TRACK_CAMERA. Returns ZERO_ROTATION if permissions are not granted.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetCenterOfMass.documentation: Returns the vector position (in region coordinates) of the center of mass. Returns the individual child prim's center of mass if called from a child, or the entire linkset's center of mass if called from the root.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetClosestNavPo.documentation: Returns a list containing the closest vector position on the navigation mesh (navmesh) to the specified point (expressed in region-local space), or an empty list if none is found. Configured using options.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetColor.documentation: Returns the Blinn-Phong RGB color vector of face (values between 0.0 and 1.0). If face is ALL_SIDES, returns the mean average of all faces.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetCreator.documentation: Returns the key (UUID) of the prim's original creator.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetDate.documentation: Returns a string representing the current date in the UTC time zone in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetDayLength.documentation: Returns an integer representing the number of seconds in the environmental day cycle applied to the current parcel.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetDayOffset.documentation: Returns an integer representing the offset duration (in seconds) added to calculate the current environmental time on this parcel.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetDisplayName.documentation: Returns the display name string of the avatar specified by id if they are in the region or cached; returns an empty string otherwise (use llRequestDisplayName if the avatar is absent).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetEnergy.documentation: Returns a float representing the remaining physics energy of the object as a percentage (0.0 to 1.0) of its maximum capacity.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetEnv.documentation: Returns a string containing the requested regional data specified by name.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetEnvironment.documentation: Returns a list containing the current environment parameters for the parcel or region at pos, retrieved in the order specified by params.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetExperienceDe.documentation: Returns a list of details for the specified experience_id, formatted as [string experience_name, key owner_id, key experience_id, integer state, string state_message, key group_id].

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetExperienceEr.documentation: Returns a text description of the specified experience error code, or a description of XP_ERROR_UNKNOWN_ERROR if the error is invalid.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetForce.documentation: Returns a vector representing the constant force currently applied to the object (if the object is physical).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetFreeMemory.documentation: Returns an integer representing the number of free bytes of memory currently available to the script.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetFreeURLs.documentation: Returns an integer representing the number of available HTTP URLs (remaining for the owner if the object is attached, or for the region if unattached).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetGMTclock.documentation: Returns a float representing the time in seconds since midnight GMT (truncated to whole seconds).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetGeometricCen.documentation: Returns a vector representing the geometric center of the object relative to its root prim.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetHTTPHeader.documentation: Returns a string representing the value of the specified header associated with the HTTP request_id.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetHealth.documentation: Returns a float representing the current health of the avatar or object specified by id.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetInventoryAcq.documentation: Returns a string containing the UTC timestamp (YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ) representing when the inventory item was placed inside the prim.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetInventoryCre.documentation: Returns the key (UUID) of the creator of the specified inventory item.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetInventoryDes.documentation: Returns a string containing the description of the specified inventory item.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetInventoryKey.documentation: Returns the key (UUID) of the specified inventory name.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetInventoryNam.documentation: Returns the name of the inventory item of the specified type (INVENTORY_*) at the index number.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetInventoryNum.documentation: Returns an integer representing the quantity of items of the specified type (INVENTORY_*) in the prim's inventory.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetInventoryPer.documentation: Returns an integer bitfield representing the permission category mask of the specified inventory item.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetInventoryTyp.documentation: Returns an integer representing the INVENTORY_* type of the named inventory item.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetKey.documentation: Returns the key (UUID) of the prim containing the script.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetLandOwnerAt.documentation: Returns the key (UUID) of the land owner at the vector pos, or NULL_KEY if the land is public.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetLinkKey.documentation: Returns the key (UUID) of the linked prim or avatar specified by link.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetLinkMedia.documentation: Returns a list containing the media parameters of the specified face on the linked prim link, retrieved in the order requested by params.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetLinkName.documentation: Returns a string containing the name of the linked prim specified by link.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetLinkNumber.documentation: Returns the integer link number of the prim containing the script (0 for unlinked, 1 for the root, and 2+ for children).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetLinkNumberOf.documentation: Returns an integer representing the number of sides (faces) of the linked prim specified by link.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetLinkPrimitiv.documentation: Returns a list of primitive parameters requested in params for the linked prim specified by link (equivalent to llGetPrimitiveParams).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetLinkSitFlags.documentation: Returns an integer representing the active sit flags currently set on the linked prim specified by link.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetListEntryTyp.documentation: Returns an integer representing the variable type (TYPE_*) of the list entry at index in the list src.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetListLength.documentation: Returns an integer representing the total number of elements in the list src.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetLocalPos.documentation: Returns a position vector relative to the root prim. If called from the root prim, it returns the global region position (or the position relative to the attachment point if attached).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetLocalRot.documentation: Returns a rotation representing the local orientation of a child prim relative to the root prim, or the object's overall rotation if called from the root.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetMass.documentation: Returns a float representing the mass of the object (in lindograms). Returns the total linkset mass if called from the root, or the individual prim's mass if called from a child prim. Returns the wearer's mass if inside an attachment.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetMassMKS.documentation: Returns a float representing the mass of the object in kilograms. Functionally identical to llGetMass except for using MKS (metric) units.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetMaxScaleFact.documentation: Returns a float representing the maximum scale factor that can be applied to the object via llScaleByFactor without violating size or linkability limits.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetMemoryLimit.documentation: Returns an integer representing the maximum memory limit (in bytes) that the script is allowed to allocate.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetMinScaleFact.documentation: Returns a float representing the minimum scale factor that can be applied to the object via llScaleByFactor without violating size limits.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetMoonDirectio.documentation: Returns a normalized vector representing the current direction of the parcel's moon, taking altitude into account. Falls back to the region's moon direction if no custom parcel environment is set.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetMoonRotation.documentation: Returns a rotation representing the orientation applied to the moon on the current parcel and altitude track. Falls back to the region's moon rotation if no custom parcel environment is set.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetNextEmail.documentation: Requests the next queued email matching the specified sender address and subject filters via the email event.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetNotecardLine.documentation: Asynchronously requests the line index line of the notecard name from the dataserver. Returns a key query handle for the dataserver event, which will return 'EOF' when reaching past the end of the notecard.

Synchronously reads the line index line of the notecard name from the region's cache, immediately returning its text without raising a dataserver event. Returns 'NAK' if not cached or 'EOF' if out of bounds.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetNumberOfNote.documentation: Asynchronously requests the total line count of the notecard name. Returns a key query handle for the dataserver event.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetNumberOfPrim.documentation: Returns an integer representing the total number of prims and seated avatars in the linkset containing the script.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetNumberOfSide.documentation: Returns an integer representing the total number of sides (faces) of the prim containing the script.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetObjectAnimat.documentation: Returns a list of strings representing the names of all active animations currently playing on the object.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetObjectDesc.documentation: Returns a string containing the description of the specific prim containing the script.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetObjectDetail.documentation: Returns a list containing the requested parameters of the specified avatar or object id, retrieved in the order requested by params.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetObjectLinkKe.documentation: Returns the key (UUID) of the linked child prim specified by link within the linkset identified by object_id.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetObjectMass.documentation: Returns a float representing the mass of the avatar or object specified by id.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetObjectName.documentation: Returns a string containing the name of the specific prim containing the script.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetObjectPermMa.documentation: Returns an integer bitfield representing the permission mask of the specified category for the object containing the script.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetObjectPrimCo.documentation: Returns an integer representing the total number of prims in the object containing the specified prim.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetOmega.documentation: Returns a vector representing the physical rotation (angular velocity) of the object in radians per second.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetOwner.documentation: Returns the key (UUID) of the object's current owner.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetOwnerKey.documentation: Returns the key (UUID) of the owner of the prim specified by id.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetParcelDetail.documentation: Returns a list containing the requested parcel details specified by params (retrieved in the same order) for the parcel at the vector pos.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetParcelFlags.documentation: Returns an integer bitfield of parcel flags (PARCEL_FLAG_*) for the parcel at the position pos.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetParcelMaxPri.documentation: Returns an integer representing the maximum combined land impact (prim limit) allowed for objects on the parcel at pos, determined either for the single parcel or sim-wide based on sim_wide.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetParcelMusicU.documentation: Returns a string containing the parcel's streaming music (audio) URL. The object owner must also be the land owner (or share the same group deeding).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetParcelPrimCo.documentation: Returns an integer representing the total land impact of objects on the parcel at pos in the specified category. If sim_wide is TRUE, returns combined usage for all regional parcels owned by the parcel owner; if FALSE, returns usage for only the specified parcel.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetParcelPrimOw.documentation: Returns a list of up to 100 strides (formatted as [key owner, integer land_impact]) representing owners of objects on the parcel at pos, sorted by owner key. Requires owner-like permissions for the parcel and the script owner's presence in the region.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetPermissions.documentation: Returns an integer bitfield representing the permissions (PERMISSION_*) currently granted to the script.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetPermissionsK.documentation: Returns the key (UUID) of the avatar that last granted or declined permissions to the script, or NULL_KEY if the permissions request was ignored or cancelled.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetPhysicsMater.documentation: Returns a list of the format [float gravity_multiplier, float restitution, float friction, float density] detailing the physical characteristics of the object.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetPos.documentation: Returns a vector representing the current position of the object in region coordinates.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetPrimMediaPar.documentation: Returns a list containing the media parameters of the specified face, retrieved in the order requested by params. Returns an empty list if no media exists on the face.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetPrimitivePar.documentation: Returns a list of primitive attribute values matching the requested params list.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetRegionAgentC.documentation: Returns an integer representing the current number of avatars in the region.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetRegionCorner.documentation: Returns a vector (in meters) representing the global grid coordinates of the south-west corner of the current region (Z component is always 0.0).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetRegionDayLen.documentation: Returns an integer representing the total number of seconds in the region-wide day cycle.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetRegionDayOff.documentation: Returns an integer representing the offset duration (in seconds) added to calculate the current environmental time for the region.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetRegionFPS.documentation: Returns a float representing the average region simulator frames per second (FPS).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetRegionFlags.documentation: Returns an integer bitfield representing the region flags (REGION_FLAG_*) currently enabled for the region containing the object.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetRegionMoonDi.documentation: Returns a normalized vector representing the current direction of the region's moon, taking altitude into account.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetRegionMoonRo.documentation: Returns a rotation representing the orientation applied to the moon at the region level, taking altitude track into account.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetRegionName.documentation: Returns a string containing the name of the current region.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetRegionSunDir.documentation: Returns a normalized vector representing the current direction of the region's sun, taking altitude into account.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetRegionSunRot.documentation: Returns a rotation representing the orientation applied to the sun at the region level, taking altitude track into account.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetRegionTimeDi.documentation: Returns a float representing the current physics time dilation of the region, ranging from 0.0 (full dilation / slow) to 1.0 (no dilation / real-world speed).
