@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetRegionTimeOf.documentation: Returns a float with subsecond precision representing the elapsed seconds since region environmental midnight or region uptime (whichever is smaller). If the region's sun position is fixed, returns region uptime.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetRenderMateri.documentation: Returns a string representing the render material on face (returns the inventory name if it is in the prim's inventory, or its key UUID otherwise).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetRootPosition.documentation: Returns a vector representing the position (in region coordinates) of the root prim of the linkset containing the script.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetRootRotation.documentation: Returns a rotation representing the orientation (relative to the region) of the root prim of the linkset containing the script.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetRot.documentation: Returns a rotation representing the prim's orientation relative to the region's axes.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetSPMaxMemory.documentation: Returns an integer representing the maximum memory (in bytes) used by the script while the memory profiler was last active (only valid after using PROFILE_SCRIPT_MEMORY).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetScale.documentation: Returns a vector representing the physical scale (dimensions in meters) of the prim containing the script.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetScriptName.documentation: Returns a string containing the name of the script calling this function.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetScriptState.documentation: Returns a boolean integer indicating whether the specified script in the prim's inventory is running (returns TRUE if running, FALSE otherwise).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetSimStats.documentation: Returns a float containing the value of the requested region statistic specified by stat_type.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetSimulatorHos.documentation: Returns a string containing the hostname of the server machine running the script (e.g., 'sim225.agni.lindenlab.com').

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetStartParamet.documentation: Returns an integer representing the start/rez parameter passed to the object on creation (returns 0 if rezzed by an agent).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetStartString.documentation: Returns the initialization string passed to the object's root prim on rez with llRezObjectWithParams (via REZ_PARAM_STRING; returns an empty string if rezzed by an agent).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetStaticPath.documentation: Returns a list of position vectors representing pathfinding waypoints between start and end on the static navmesh for a character of the specified radius. Ignores movable obstacles and can be used in any region regardless of dynamic pathfinding status.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetStatus.documentation: Returns a boolean integer indicating whether the specified status flag status is enabled for the object.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetSubString.documentation: Returns a copy of the substring from src within the inclusive range specified by the start and end indices. Negative indices count backward from the end. If start is greater than end, the substring is the excluded range.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetSunDirection.documentation: Returns a normalized vector representing the current direction of the parcel's sun, taking altitude into account. Falls back to the region's sun direction if no custom parcel environment is set.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetSunRotation.documentation: Returns a rotation representing the orientation applied to the sun on the current parcel and altitude track. Falls back to the region's sun rotation if no custom parcel environment is set.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetTexture.documentation: Returns a string representing the Blinn-Phong diffuse texture on face (returns the inventory name if it is a texture in the prim's inventory, or its key UUID otherwise).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetTextureOffse.documentation: Returns a vector containing the texture offsets of face in the X (horizontal U) and Y (vertical V) components (Z is unused).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetTextureRot.documentation: Returns a float representing the texture rotation angle (in radians) on face.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetTextureScale.documentation: Returns a vector containing the texture scales of face in the X and Y components (Z is unused).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetTime.documentation: Returns a float representing the elapsed script time in seconds with subsecond precision (since the script started, was reset, or since the last call to llResetTime or llGetAndResetTime).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetTimeOfDay.documentation: Returns a float with subsecond precision representing the elapsed seconds since parcel environmental midnight or region uptime (whichever is smaller). If the parcel's sun position is fixed, returns region uptime.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetTimestamp.documentation: Returns a string containing the current date and time in the UTC time zone formatted as an ISO 8601 timestamp ('YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.ff..fZ').

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetTorque.documentation: Returns a vector representing the physical torque force currently acting on the object (if the object is physical).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetUnixTime.documentation: Returns an integer representing the current Unix timestamp (the number of seconds elapsed since 00:00:00 Jan 1, 1970 UTC).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetUsedMemory.documentation: Returns an integer representing the total number of bytes of memory currently used by the script (non-Mono scripts always return 16,384 bytes).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetUsername.documentation: Returns a string representing the unique username of the avatar specified by id if they are connected to the region or cached; returns an empty string otherwise (use llRequestUsername if the avatar is absent).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetVel.documentation: Returns a vector representing the velocity of the object (in meters per second) relative to the global region coordinates. For physical objects, returns the velocity of its center of mass.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetVisualParams.documentation: Returns a list containing the values of the visual parameters requested in params for the agent specified by agentid.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GetWallclock.documentation: Returns a float representing the time in seconds since midnight Pacific Time (PST/PDT), which is equivalent to Second Life Time (SLT) truncated to whole seconds.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GiveAgentInvent.documentation: Gives the specified inventory items to the agent as a new folder named folder, as permitted by the permissions system. Customizes the transfer using options.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GiveInventory.documentation: Gives the specified inventory item to the destination, as permitted by the permissions system. The destination can be any agent, or an object located in the same region.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GiveInventoryLi.documentation: Gives the list of inventory items to target as a new folder named folder. If target is an object, the items are passed directly into its inventory and no folder is created. The target must be an agent or an object in the same region.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GiveMoney.documentation: Transfers the specified amount of L$ from the script owner to the destination avatar. Silently fails if the PERMISSION_DEBIT permission has not been granted. Returns 0 (use llTransferLindenDollars to match transactions to transaction_result events).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GodLikeRezObjec.documentation: Rezzes an object directly from a UUID specified by inventory at the position pos, provided the owner has the god-bit set.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Ground.documentation: Returns a float representing the ground height directly below the prim's position offset by the vector offset.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GroundContour.documentation: Returns a vector representing the ground contour direction (the direction with no change in elevation) directly below the prim's position offset by the vector offset.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GroundNormal.documentation: Returns a vector representing the ground surface normal vector directly below the current position offset by the vector offset.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GroundRepel.documentation: Critically damps the object's vertical motion to height (using critical damping timescale tau) if it is within height * 0.5 of the terrain (or water level if water is TRUE). Only works on physics-enabled objects; do not use with vehicles.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.GroundSlope.documentation: Returns a vector representing the ground slope directly below the prim's position offset by the vector offset.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.HMAC.documentation: Returns a Base64-encoded HMAC hash of msg using the secret key private_key and the specified digest algorithm (md5, sha1, sha224, sha256, sha384, or sha512).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.HTTPRequest.documentation: Sends an HTTP request to the specified url containing body and configured via parameters. Raises an http_response event and returns a key query handle identifying the request.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.HTTPResponse.documentation: Responds to the incoming HTTP request identified by request_id with the HTTP status code status and the payload body.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Hash.documentation: Returns an integer representing the 32-bit hash value of the string val (returns 0 if the string is empty).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.InsertString.documentation: Returns a new string representing dst with src inserted starting at the zero-based index pos. Note that this operation does not modify dst itself.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.InstantMessage.documentation: Sends an instant message containing message to the user identified by their key.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.IntegerToBase64.documentation: Returns an 8-character Base64 string representing the big-endian encoded value of number.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.IsFriend.documentation: Returns TRUE if agent_id and the owner of the script are friends, and FALSE otherwise.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.IsLinkGLTFMater.documentation: Checks the specified face on the linked prim link. Returns TRUE if the face material is a PBR render material, or FALSE if it uses Blinn-Phong diffuse textures.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Json2List.documentation: Parses the JSON string src and returns a list representing its top-level elements.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.JsonGetValue.documentation: Parses the JSON string json and returns the value found by traversing the specified path of specifiers as a string.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.JsonSetValue.documentation: Returns a new JSON string representing json with the target located at specifiers set to value. Supports JSON_APPEND to append elements. Writing JSON_DELETE deletes the target. Overwriting array bounds or setting non-array levels with array indices returns JSON_INVALID.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.JsonValueType.documentation: Parses the JSON string json and returns the JSON type constant (JSON_*) representing the value found at specifiers.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Key2Name.documentation: Returns a string containing the name of the prim or avatar specified by id. The target must be a valid, rezzed entity in the current region, otherwise an empty string is returned. Avatars return their legacy name.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.KeyCountKeyValu.documentation: Starts an asynchronous transaction requesting the total count of keys in the experience data store. Returns a key query handle for the dataserver event.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.KeysKeyValue.documentation: Starts an asynchronous transaction to retrieve count keys from the experience data store starting at the zero-based index first. Returns a key query handle for the dataserver event. Fails with XP_ERROR_KEY_NOT_FOUND if out of bounds.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Linear2sRGB.documentation: Returns a vector representing the conversion of color from the linear RGB colorspace into the sRGB colorspace.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.LinkAdjustSound.documentation: Adjusts the volume of the currently playing sound attached to the linked prim link (has no effect on sounds started with llTriggerSound).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.LinkParticleSys.documentation: Creates or updates a particle system on the linked prim link based on the list of rules. An empty list removes the particle system.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.LinkPlaySound.documentation: Plays the specified sound on the linked prim link (once or looping) at volume. Only one sound can be attached to a prim at a time; new attachments or calling llStopSound stops previous playback. Controlled by flags.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.LinkSetSoundQue.documentation: Enables or disables sound queuing on the linked prim link. When set to TRUE, sounds will queue and play in sequence.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.LinkSetSoundRad.documentation: Limits the audibility radius of attached and triggered scripted sounds to distance radius (in meters) around the linked prim link.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.LinkSitTarget.documentation: Sets the sit target position (offset) and orientation (rot) for the linked prim link, relative to the prim's own position and rotation. Clear by setting offset to <0.0, 0.0, 0.0>.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.LinkStopSound.documentation: Stops the playback of any currently playing attached sound on the linked prim link.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.LinksetDataAvai.documentation: Returns an integer representing the number of bytes available/remaining in the linkset's datastore.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.LinksetDataCoun.documentation: Returns the total count of keys in the linkset datastore that match the regular expression pattern.
Returns an integer representing the total number of unique keys stored in the linkset's datastore.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.LinksetDataDele.documentation: Deletes the unprotected key-value pair specified by name from the linkset's datastore, triggering a linkset_data event.
Deletes all keys in the datastore matching the regular expression pattern. Returns a list [num_deleted, num_failed_protected]. Decrypts and deletes protected keys if matching pass is provided.
Deletes the protected key-value pair specified by name from the linkset's datastore using the passphrase pass, triggering a linkset_data event.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.LinksetDataFind.documentation: Returns an alphabetically sorted list of up to count keys from the datastore that match the regular expression pattern, starting at index start (returns all matching keys if count < 1).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.LinksetDataList.documentation: Returns an alphabetically sorted list of up to count keys from the datastore, starting at index start (returns all keys if count < 1).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.LinksetDataRead.documentation: Reads and returns the string value corresponding to key name from the linkset's datastore.
Reads and returns the string value of the protected key name from the linkset's datastore using the passphrase pass.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.LinksetDataRese.documentation: Erases all key-value pairs stored in the linkset's datastore, triggering a linkset_data event (with LINKSETDATA_RESET) in all scripts in the linkset.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.LinksetDataWrit.documentation: Creates or updates an unprotected key-value pair (name and value) in the linkset's datastore. Returns an integer success or failure code.
Creates or updates a protected key-value pair (name and value) in the linkset's datastore using the passphrase pass. Returns an integer success or failure code.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.List2CSV.documentation: Returns a string of comma-separated values taken in order from the list src.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.List2Float.documentation: Returns the float value at index in the list src. Returns 0.0 if the index is out of bounds or if the value cannot be type-cast.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.List2Integer.documentation: Returns the integer value at index in the list src. Returns 0 if the index is out of bounds or if the value cannot be type-cast.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.List2Json.documentation: Converts the list values into a JSON string of the specified type (either a JSON_ARRAY or a JSON_OBJECT). Returns JSON_INVALID if an error is encountered.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.List2Key.documentation: Returns the key (UUID) value at index in the list src. Returns a null string/key if the index is out of bounds or if the value cannot be type-cast.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.List2List.documentation: Returns a new list containing the subset of entries from src within the inclusive range specified by the start and end indices. Negative indices count backward from the end.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.List2ListSlice.documentation: Returns a list containing the slice_index'th element of every stride within the inclusive range from start to end in the strided list src. Stride must be a positive integer.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.List2ListStride.documentation: Returns a new list containing the first element of every stride in the strided list src within the inclusive range from start to end.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.List2Rot.documentation: Returns the rotation value at index in the list src. Returns ZERO_ROTATION if the index is out of bounds or if the value cannot be type-cast.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.List2String.documentation: Returns the string value at index in the list src. Returns an empty string if the index is out of bounds.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.List2Vector.documentation: Returns the vector value at index in the list src. Returns ZERO_VECTOR if the index is out of bounds or if the value cannot be type-cast.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ListFindList.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns the integer index of the first instance of list test within the list src (returns -1 if not found).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ListFindListNex.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns the integer index of the specified instance of list test within the list src (returns -1 if not found).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ListFindStrided.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns the integer index of the first instance of list test in the strided list src within the range from start to end (stepping through by stride). Returns -1 if not found.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ListInsertList.documentation: Returns a new list containing all elements of dest with the elements of src inserted starting at index start. Does not modify dest itself.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ListRandomize.documentation: Returns a randomized copy of the list src by blocks of size stride. If the list length is not perfectly divisible by stride, no randomization occurs.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ListReplaceList.documentation: Returns a copy of the list dest with the inclusive range from start to end removed, and the elements of src inserted in its place at start.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ListSort.documentation: Returns a copy of the list src, sorted into blocks of stride in ascending order (if ascending is TRUE) or descending order (if FALSE). Only works if the first entry of each block shares the same datatype.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ListSortStrided.documentation: Returns a copy of the list src sorted into blocks of stride by the element at stride_index in each block. Sorted in ascending order (if ascending is TRUE) or descending order (if FALSE).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ListStatistics.documentation: Returns a float representing the result of performing the statistical aggregate function operation (a LIST_STAT_* constant) on the numeric list src.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Listen.documentation: Creates a listener on channel from name and id for msg. Returns an integer listener handle used to control or remove the listener. Empty strings or NULL_KEY filters do not filter on those parameters.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ListenControl.documentation: Enables or disables the listener specified by the integer handle. If active is TRUE, the listener is activated; if FALSE, it is deactivated.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ListenRemove.documentation: Completely removes the listener specified by the integer handle.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.LoadURL.documentation: Shows a dialog box displaying message to the avatar avatar offering to open the specified url. Clicking yes launches the URL in their default web browser.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Log.documentation: Returns a float representing the natural (base e) logarithm of the positive value val (returns 0.0 if val <= 0).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Log10.documentation: Returns a float representing the base-10 (common) logarithm of the positive value val (returns 0.0 if val <= 0).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.LookAt.documentation: Causes the object to orient its positive Z-axis (up axis) toward the target vector, keeping its positive X-axis (forward axis) below the horizon. Tracks target until llStopLookAt is called or strength is set to 0.0.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.LoopSound.documentation: Plays the attached sound looping indefinitely at the specified volume. Only one sound can be attached to a prim at a time; new loops adjust the volume of the currently playing sound without restarting it.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.LoopSoundMaster.documentation: Plays the attached sound looping indefinitely at the specified volume and declares it a Sync Master, forcing slave sounds to synchronize with it.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.LoopSoundSlave.documentation: Plays the attached sound looping indefinitely at the specified volume, synchronized to the most audible active Sync Master in range.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.MD5String.documentation: Returns a string of 32 hex characters representing the MD5 checksum of src salted with nonce (formatted as ':' + nonce).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.MakeExplosion.documentation: Deprecated. Generates a circular explosion of particles. Use llParticleSystem instead.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.MakeFire.documentation: Deprecated. Generates fire-like particles. Use llParticleSystem instead.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.MakeFountain.documentation: Deprecated. Generates a fountain of particles. Use llParticleSystem instead.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.MakeSmoke.documentation: Deprecated. Generates smoke-like particles. Use llParticleSystem instead.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ManageEstateAcc.documentation: Adds or removes agents from the estate's access or ban lists, or groups from the estate's group access list, specified by the action. Returns TRUE if successful, or FALSE if throttled, if the action/ID is invalid, or if the script owner lacks estate management rights.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.MapBeacon.documentation: Displays an in-world beacon and optionally opens the world map for the avatar touching or wearing the object, centered on region_name with pos highlighted. Only works for attached scripts or during touch events.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.MapDestination.documentation: Opens the world map for the avatar touching or wearing the object, centered on simname with pos highlighted. Only works for attached scripts or during touch events. Note: look_at currently has no effect.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.MessageLinked.documentation: Triggers a link_message event, sending num, str, and id to the scripts in the prim(s) specified by link to allow scripts within the same object to communicate.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.MinEventDelay.documentation: Sets the minimum delay time between events being handled (minimums and defaults vary by event type).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ModPow.documentation: Returns an integer representing a raised to the power b, modulo c (i.e., (a**b)%c). The b value is capped at 0xFFFF (16 bits).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ModifyLand.documentation: Modifies the terrain using the specified land action and brush size (0, 1, or 2, corresponding to 2m x 2m, 4m x 4m, or 8m x 8m).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.MoveToTarget.documentation: Critically damps the physical object's motion to position target in tau seconds. Setting tau to 0.0 stops the critical damping; recommended tau values are greater than 0.2.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Name2Key.documentation: Requests the key (UUID) of the avatar name in the current region. Returns NULL_KEY if no matching agent is present. Formats are 'First Last' or 'first.last' (assumes 'Resident' if last name is omitted; case-insensitive).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.NavigateTo.documentation: Directs a pathfinding character to navigate to the position pos (located in the current or adjacent regions) using the parameters specified in options.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.OffsetTexture.documentation: Sets the texture horizontal (u) and vertical (v) offsets for the chosen face. If face is ALL_SIDES, offsets all faces.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.OpenFloater.documentation: Opens the specified viewer floater_name loaded with url and configured via params. Returns an integer error code, or 0 if successful.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.OpenRemoteDataC.documentation: Deprecated. Creates a channel to listen for incoming XML-RPC calls, triggering a remote_data event with the channel ID once available.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Ord.documentation: Returns the integer Unicode (ordinal) value of the character at index in the string val.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.OverMyLand.documentation: Returns TRUE if the avatar or object specified by key id is over land owned by the script owner, or FALSE otherwise.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.OwnerSay.documentation: Sends the chat message msg privately to the object owner (the owner must be currently in the same region for the message to be received).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ParcelMediaComm.documentation: Controls the playback of movies and other multimedia resources on a parcel or for an agent, using the PARCEL_MEDIA_COMMAND_* settings specified in commandList.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ParcelMediaQuer.documentation: Queries the media properties of the parcel containing the script, returning a list of values in the order requested by query. Only works if the object is owned by the landowner or deeded to the land's group.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ParseString2Lis.documentation: Breaks the string src into a list of substrings, discarding any separators, keeping spacers, and omitting any empty null values. separators and spacers accept up to 8 string entries each.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ParseStringKeep.documentation: Breaks the string src into a list, discarding separators and keeping spacers, while preserving empty null values (unlike llParseString2List). separators and spacers accept up to 8 string entries each.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ParticleSystem.documentation: Creates or updates a particle system on the prim containing the script based on rules. An empty list removes the particle system.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.PassCollisions.documentation: Sets the pass-collisions attribute. If pass is TRUE, collision events are passed from child prims to the root; if FALSE (default), they only trigger events in the affected child prim.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.PassTouches.documentation: Sets the pass-touches attribute. If pass is TRUE, touch events are passed from child prims to the root; if FALSE (default), they only trigger events in the affected child prim.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.PatrolPoints.documentation: Directs a pathfinding character to patrol sequentially through the coordinates specified in patrolPoints, configured by options.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.PlaySound.documentation: Plays the specified sound once at volume, attached to the object. Only one sound can be attached to a prim at a time; new sounds or calling llStopSound stops previous playback. A second call with the same sound adjusts the volume without restarting it.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.PlaySoundSlave.documentation: Plays the attached sound once at volume, synchronized to the next loop point of the most audible active Sync Master.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Pow.documentation: Returns a float representing base raised to the power exponent. Returns 0 and triggers a Math Error for imaginary results.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.PreloadSound.documentation: Causes nearby viewers in range to preload the specified sound from the object's inventory to prevent playback delays.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Pursue.documentation: Directs a pathfinding character to pursue and chase target, configured by the parameters specified in options.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.PushObject.documentation: Applies physical impulse (force) and ang_impulse (rotational force) to the specified target avatar or object.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ReadKeyValue.documentation: Starts an asynchronous transaction to read the value associated with key k in the experience. Returns a key query handle for the dataserver event. Fails with XP_ERROR_KEY_NOT_FOUND if the key does not exist.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RefreshPrimURL.documentation: Legacy function intended to reload the web page displayed on the prim's faces (currently non-functional).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RegionSay.documentation: Broadcasts the message msg on channel to the entire region (heard by any script listening on that channel; channel 0 is not permitted).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RegionSayTo.documentation: Sends the message msg on channel privately to the targeted avatar or object (if within the region). If target is an avatar and channel is non-zero, the message can also be heard by any attachments worn by the avatar.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ReleaseCamera.documentation: Deprecated. Intended to return camera control back to the avatar (use llClearCameraParams instead).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ReleaseControls.documentation: Stops taking inputs (previously acquired via llTakeControls) from the avatar, dequeuing any remaining control events and revoking the PERMISSION_TAKE_CONTROLS permission.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ReleaseURL.documentation: Releases the specified url (previously obtained via llRequestURL), rendering it no longer usable.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RemoteDataReply.documentation: Deprecated. Sends an XML-RPC reply on channel to message_id with payload string sdata and integer idata.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RemoteDataSetRe.documentation: Deprecated. Used with XML-RPC to reregister remote data channels if the object moves to another region.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RemoteLoadScrip.documentation: Copies the script name into target, setting it running (if running is TRUE) with the start_param, provided the script owner has modify permissions on target and target's PIN matches pin (set via llSetRemoteScriptAccessPin).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RemoveFromLandB.documentation: Removes the specified avatar from the land parcel's ban list.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RemoveFromLandP.documentation: Removes the specified avatar from the land parcel's pass/access list.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RemoveInventory.documentation: Permanently deletes the named inventory item from the prim's inventory.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RemoveVehicleFl.documentation: Disables the specified vehicle flags (sets them to FALSE) using the bitwise mask flags.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ReplaceAgentEnv.documentation: Replaces the region and parcel environment seen by the specified agent_id as part of an experience, transitioning the settings over transition seconds. Passing NULL_KEY or an empty string for environment restores defaults.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ReplaceEnvironm.documentation: Replaces the environment on the parcel containing position (or the entire region if position is <-1.0, -1.0, -1.0>) for the specified track_no. Modifies day_length and day_offset if specified. Requires edit permissions on the parcel or estate management rights.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ReplaceSubStrin.documentation: Returns a new string representing src with count occurrences of pattern replaced by replacement_pattern. Setting count to 0 replaces all occurrences; positive counts process left-to-right, while negative counts process right-to-left.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RequestAgentDat.documentation: Asynchronously requests the specified data category (DATA_*) about the agent id. Triggers a dataserver event with the results and returns a key query handle.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RequestDisplayN.documentation: Asynchronously requests the display name of the agent specified by id, triggering a dataserver event with the results. The agent does not need to be online or in the region. Returns a key query handle.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RequestExperien.documentation: Requests permission from the specified agent to participate in the experience. These permissions are persistent and apply grid-wide across all scripts in the experience, automatically triggering experience_permissions or experience_permissions_denied.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RequestInventor.documentation: Asynchronously requests data for the inventory item specified by name, triggering a dataserver event. Currently, only landmark items are supported (which return local region coordinates). Returns a key query handle.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RequestPermissi.documentation: Requests permissions (a bitfield specified by permissions) from the agent in the same region, calling run_time_permissions if granted. This call does not pause script execution.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RequestSecureUR.documentation: Asynchronously requests one secure HTTPS (SSL, port 12043) URL for use by this object, triggering an http_request event. Returns a key query handle.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RequestSimulato.documentation: Asynchronously requests data (using a DATA_SIM_* constant) about the region. Triggers a dataserver event and returns a key query handle.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RequestURL.documentation: Asynchronously requests one HTTP URL for use by this script, triggering an http_request event. Returns a key query handle.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RequestUserKey.documentation: Asynchronously requests the Agent ID key (UUID) for the agent specified by their current or historical username, returning NULL_KEY if not found. Returns a key query handle for the dataserver event.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RequestUsername.documentation: Asynchronously requests the unique single-word username of the agent identified by id, triggering a dataserver event. The agent does not need to be online or in the region. Returns a key query handle.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ResetAnimationO.documentation: Resets the animation override for anim_state to its default value (use 'ALL' to reset all states). Requires the PERMISSION_OVERRIDE_ANIMATIONS permission.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ResetLandBanLis.documentation: Removes all blocked residents from the land parcel's ban list.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ResetLandPassLi.documentation: Removes all residents from the land parcel's access/pass list.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ResetOtherScrip.documentation: Resets the script name located in the prim's inventory.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ResetTime.documentation: Resets the script's elapsed time timer back to zero.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ReturnObjectsBy.documentation: Returns objects specified by the list of UUIDs objects to their owners. Requires the PERMISSION_RETURN_OBJECTS permission, and the script owner must own the parcel or be an estate manager/region owner.

Returns objects owned by owner within the specified scope (parcel, parcel owner, or region). Requires the PERMISSION_RETURN_OBJECTS permission, and the script owner must own the parcel or be an estate manager/region owner.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RezAtRoot.documentation: Instantiates the inventory object at position moving at velocity, rotated to rot with its root prim centered exactly on position, passing param as the on_rez start parameter.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RezObject.documentation: Instantiates the inventory object at pos with velocity vel and rotation rot, passing param as the on_rez start parameter. The vel parameter is ignored if the rezzed object is non-physical.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RezObjectWithPa.documentation: Instantiates the inventory object (defaulting to the rezzing prim's position unless REZ_POS is specified) using the initial set of parameters specified in params. Returns the key of the rezzed object, or a blank key on failure.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Rot2Angle.documentation: Returns a float representing the rotation angle of rot.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Rot2Axis.documentation: Returns a vector representing the rotation axis of rot.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Rot2Euler.documentation: Returns a vector representing the Euler rotation (roll, pitch, yaw) of quat, with each component expressed in radians.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Rot2Fwd.documentation: Returns a unit vector pointing in the local positive X direction (forward) relative to the parent (root prim or region) defined by rotation q.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Rot2Left.documentation: Returns a unit vector pointing in the local positive Y direction (left) relative to the parent (root prim or region) defined by rotation q.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Rot2Up.documentation: Returns a unit vector pointing in the local positive Z direction (up) relative to the parent (root prim or region) defined by rotation q.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RotBetween.documentation: Returns a rotation representing the shortest path rotation from vector start to vector end.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RotLookAt.documentation: Causes the object to smoothly rotate to target_direction with a force defined by strength and damping. A strength of 0.0 cancels the rotation target. Rotation is maintained until stopped with llStopLookAt.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RotTarget.documentation: Registers the rotation rot with a leeway tolerance error (in radians) as a target, triggering at_rot_target and not_at_rot_target events. Returns an integer handle to unregister the target via llRotTargetRemove.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RotTargetRemove.documentation: Removes the rotational target specified by the integer handle registered with llRotTarget.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.RotateTexture.documentation: Sets the texture rotation of face to the specified angle (in radians). If face is ALL_SIDES, rotates the texture on all faces.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Round.documentation: Returns the integer that float val is closest to.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SHA1String.documentation: Returns a string of 40 hex characters representing the SHA-1 security hash of src.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SHA256String.documentation: Returns a string of 64 hex characters representing the SHA-256 security hash of src.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SameGroup.documentation: Returns TRUE if the agent or object specified by uuid is in the same region (simulator) and shares the same active group as the prim containing the script; returns FALSE otherwise.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Say.documentation: Says the text message msg on the specified channel. The message can be heard up to a 20m radius. Channels other than PUBLIC_CHANNEL (0) and DEBUG_CHANNEL (2147483647) are not visible to avatars and can be used for script-to-script communication.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ScaleByFactor.documentation: Attempts to uniformly resize the entire object by scaling_factor, maintaining size-position ratios of the prims. Fails if the linkset is physical, a pathfinding character, in keyframed motion, would exceed prim scale/linkability limits, or would overflow parcel capacity.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ScaleTexture.documentation: Sets the diffuse texture horizontal u and vertical v scales (repeats) on the specified face of the prim. Setting face to ALL_SIDES updates all sides. Negative scale values flip the texture.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ScriptDanger.documentation: Returns TRUE if the vector position pos is over public land, sandbox land, land restricting edit/build permissions, or land that disables outside scripts.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ScriptProfiler.documentation: Enables or disables the script's profiling state using flags (supports PROFILE_SCRIPT_MEMORY on Mono, or PROFILE_NONE). Active profiling can significantly reduce script performance.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SendRemoteData.documentation: Deprecated. Sends an XML-RPC request to dest on channel, containing the channel ID as a string, integer idata, and string sdata. Returns a key representing the message_id.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Sensor.documentation: Performs a single scan from the prim's forward vector for name and id of type within radius meters and arc radians. Results trigger a sensor or no_sensor event. Passing empty filters (blank name, 0 type, or NULL_KEY id) disables that filter.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SensorRemove.documentation: Removes the periodic sensor previously configured by llSensorRepeat.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SensorRepeat.documentation: Sets up a repeating periodic scan every rate seconds for name and id of type within radius meters and arc radians of the forward vector. Results trigger sensor or no_sensor events.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetAgentEnviron.documentation: Sets an individual agent's environmental settings using the attributes in params over a duration of transition seconds. Must be used as part of an experience; passing an empty list removes overrides.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetAgentRot.documentation: Sets the rotation of the avatar to rot, controlled by flags.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetAlpha.documentation: Sets the diffuse texture alpha (opacity) of face. If face is ALL_SIDES, applies to all faces. Values are clamped between 0.1 and 1.0 (where 1.0 is fully opaque).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetAngularVeloc.documentation: Sets the angular velocity of a physical object to initial_omega (mass-independent). If local is TRUE, applied in local coordinates; if FALSE, applied in global coordinates. Has no effect on non-physical objects.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetAnimationOve.documentation: Overrides the default animation for anim_state with anim (which must be in the object's inventory or a built-in animation). Requires the PERMISSION_OVERRIDE_ANIMATIONS permission.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetBuoyancy.documentation: Sets the buoyancy of a physical object (requires physics to be enabled). A value of 0.0 offers no buoyancy, < 1.0 sinks, 1.0 counteracts gravity, and > 1.0 rises.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetCameraAtOffs.documentation: Sets the target offset vector (in local coordinates) that a seated avatar's camera will look at.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetCameraEyeOff.documentation: Sets the eye offset vector (in local coordinates) where a seated avatar's camera is positioned.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetCameraParams.documentation: Sets multiple camera parameters simultaneously using the list of rules. Requires the PERMISSION_CONTROL_CAMERA runtime permission.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetClickAction.documentation: Sets the action (a CLICK_ACTION_* flag) performed when an avatar left-clicks the prim.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetColor.documentation: Sets the Blinn-Phong diffuse RGB color of face. If face is ALL_SIDES, applies the color to all faces.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetContentType.documentation: Sets the 'Content-Type' header of subsequent HTTP server responses (via llHTTPResponse) for request_id using the specified content_type (a CONTENT_TYPE_* constant).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetDamage.documentation: Sets the amount of damage delivered when this object hits an avatar. The object is immediately destroyed upon inflicting damage, and no collision event is triggered.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetEnvironment.documentation: Overrides the environmental settings at position for a parcel (or region if position is <-1.0, -1.0, z>) using the parameters in params. Passing an empty params list removes previous overrides.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetForce.documentation: Applies a constant linear force to a physical object. If local is TRUE, force is applied relative to local coordinates; if FALSE, applied relative to region coordinates.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetForceAndTorq.documentation: Sets both the constant linear force and constant torque acting on a physical object. If local is TRUE, forces are applied in local coordinates; if FALSE, in global coordinates.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetGroundTextur.documentation: Changes the painted terrain textures on the region based on changes. The script owner must have estate management rights. Returns an integer status.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetHoverHeight.documentation: Critically damps the physical object's vertical movement to hover at height (above ground, or above water if water is TRUE) in tau seconds. Do not use with vehicles; call llStopHover to cancel.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetInventoryPer.documentation: Sets the specified permission category of the inventory item to the value permissions mask.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetKeyframedMot.documentation: Smoothly moves a non-physical object between the positions, orientations, and times specified in the keyframes list, configured via options. Collisions with keyframed objects are ignored. An empty keyframes list terminates the motion.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetLinkAlpha.documentation: Sets the Blinn-Phong alpha (transparency) of face on the linked prim link.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetLinkCamera.documentation: Sets the camera eye position offset eye and looking-at position offset at for avatars who sit on the linked prim link.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetLinkColor.documentation: Sets the Blinn-Phong diffuse RGB color of face on the linked prim link.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetLinkGLTFOver.documentation: Sets or removes individual GLTF override parameters specified by params on face of the linked prim link.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetLinkMedia.documentation: Sets the media parameters specified by params on face of the linked prim link without a script delay. Returns an integer STATUS_* flag detailing success or failure.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetLinkPrimitiv.documentation: Deprecated (use llSetLinkPrimitiveParamsFast instead). Sets primitive parameters for the linked prim link according to rules.
Sets primitive parameters for the linked prim link according to rules with no built-in script sleep delay.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetLinkRenderMa.documentation: Applies material (UUID or inventory name) to face of the linked prim link. Note: This clears most PRIM_GLTF_* properties on the face except for repeats, offsets, and rotation.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetLinkSitFlags.documentation: Sets the sit target flags for the linked prim link inside the linkset.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetLinkTexture.documentation: Applies texture (UUID or inventory name) to face of the linked prim link.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetLinkTextureA.documentation: Animates the texture on face of the linked prim link by setting the scale and offset according to mode. Parameters sizex/sizey define frames, start defines the start frame/angle, length defines duration, and rate defines playback speed.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetLocalRot.documentation: Sets the rotation of a child prim relative to its root prim using rot.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetMemoryLimit.documentation: Requests that limit bytes are reserved for the script. Returns TRUE on success or FALSE on failure (has no effect in LSO).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetObjectDesc.documentation: Sets the description of the prim containing the script to description (limited to 127 characters).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetObjectName.documentation: Sets the name of the prim containing the script to name.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetObjectPermMa.documentation: Sets the specified permission mask category to value on the root object containing the script.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetParcelForSal.documentation: Sets the parcel the object is on for sale. If ForSale is TRUE, puts the land up for sale using Options (price, buyer, objects included). Setting ForSale to FALSE removes the parcel from sale. Requires parcel ownership and the PERMISSION_PRIVILEGED_LAND_ACCESS permission. Returns an error code or 0 if successful.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetParcelMusicU.documentation: Sets the streaming audio (music) URL for the parcel containing the object. The object owner must match the landowner or land group.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetPayPrice.documentation: Suggests default amounts for the pay text input field price and the four payment dialog quick_pay_buttons when an avatar pays this object.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetPhysicsMater.documentation: Configures the physical characteristics of an object. The mask bitfield specifies which of the other parameters (gravity_multiplier, restitution, friction, or density) should be applied to the object.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetPos.documentation: Moves the non-physical object or prim toward the vector pos (up to 10m). If called in a child prim, pos is treated as root-relative; if called from the root prim, the entire object is moved.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetPrimMediaPar.documentation: Sets the media parameters specified by params on the designated face of the prim. Returns an integer STATUS_* flag detailing success or failure.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetPrimURL.documentation: Deprecated (use llSetPrimMediaParams instead). Updates the URL displayed on the prim's faces.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetPrimitivePar.documentation: Deprecated (use llSetLinkPrimitiveParamsFast instead). Sets the prim's attributes according to rules.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetRegionPos.documentation: Tries to move the entire object so that its root prim is within 0.1m of the vector position (underground positions are set to ground level). Returns TRUE on success or FALSE on failure.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetRemoteScript.documentation: Sets the prim's remote script access PIN to pin (a non-zero value enables loading via llRemoteLoadScriptPin, while zero disables it).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetRenderMateri.documentation: Applies material (UUID or inventory name) to face of the prim. Note: This clears most PRIM_GLTF_* properties on the face except for repeats, offsets, and rotation.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetRot.documentation: Sets the rotation of the prim to rot. If in a child prim, rot is treated as root-relative; if in the root prim of a non-physical object, rotates the entire object.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetScale.documentation: Sets the physical scale (dimensions) of the prim containing the script to size.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetScriptState.documentation: Sets the running state of the script name in the prim's inventory. If running is TRUE, the script is enabled; if FALSE, it is disabled.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetSitText.documentation: Displays the string text instead of 'Sit' (or 'Sit Here') in the viewer's right-click context menu.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetSoundQueuein.documentation: Sets whether attached sounds wait for the current sound to end before playing (enables queuing if queue is TRUE, disables if FALSE). The queue is one level deep.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetSoundRadius.documentation: Limits the audibility radius of attached and triggered scripted sounds to distance radius.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetStatus.documentation: Sets the object status attributes specified by status to value.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetText.documentation: Displays floating text above the prim with the specified color vector and transparency alpha.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetTexture.documentation: Applies the Blinn-Phong diffuse texture to face of the prim.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetTextureAnim.documentation: Animates the texture on face of the prim by setting its scale and offset. mode defines options, sizex/sizey define frames, start defines the start frame/angle, length defines duration, and rate defines playback speed.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetTimerEvent.documentation: Sets a timer to trigger a timer event periodically every sec seconds. Passing 0.0 stops further timer events.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetTorque.documentation: Applies a constant torque rotational force to a physical object. If local is TRUE, torque is applied in local coordinates; if FALSE, applied in global coordinates.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetTouchText.documentation: Displays the string text instead of 'Touch' in the right-click context menu.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetVehicleFlags.documentation: Enables the vehicle flags specified in the Flags bitmask.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetVehicleFloat.documentation: Sets the specified vehicle float parameter param to value.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetVehicleRotat.documentation: Sets the specified vehicle rotation parameter param to rot.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetVehicleType.documentation: Sets the vehicle physics preset type to one of the default vehicle types.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetVehicleVecto.documentation: Sets the specified vehicle vector parameter param to vec.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SetVelocity.documentation: Sets the linear velocity of a physical object to velocity. If local is TRUE, velocity is treated as a local directional vector; if FALSE, as a global region directional vector. Has no effect on non-physical objects.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Shout.documentation: Shouts the text message msg on the specified channel. The message can be heard up to a 100m radius. All channels other than PUBLIC_CHANNEL (0) and DEBUG_CHANNEL (2147483647) are not sent to avatars and are used to communicate with scripts.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SignRSA.documentation: Returns the Base64-encoded RSA signature of msg using the PEM-formatted private_key and the specified digest algorithm (sha1, sha224, sha256, sha384, or sha512). Can be paired with llVerifyRSA to pass verifiable messages.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Sin.documentation: Returns a float representing the sine of theta.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SitOnLink.documentation: Forces the avatar specified by agent_id (who must be participating in the experience) to sit on the sit target of the prim indicated by link. If occupied, searches down the linkset for an available sit target. Returns an integer.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SitTarget.documentation: Sets the sit target position (offset) and rotation (rot) relative to the prim's position and orientation. Clears the sit target if offset is ZERO_VECTOR.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Sleep.documentation: Puts the script to sleep for sec seconds (at least until the next server-frame, ~0.02222 seconds). The script is inactive during this time. If sec is 0.0 or less, the script does not sleep.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Sound.documentation: Deprecated (use llPlaySound instead). Plays the specified sound at volume, with options to loop or queue the sound.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SoundPreload.documentation: Deprecated (use llPreloadSound instead). Preloads the specified sound on viewers within range.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Sqrt.documentation: Returns a float representing the square root of the positive value val. Triggers a math runtime error if val is less than 0.0 (imaginary results).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.StartAnimation.documentation: Starts the animation anim (inventory or built-in) on the avatar who granted the script the PERMISSION_TRIGGER_ANIMATION permission (automatically granted for attached or sat-on objects).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.StartObjectAnim.documentation: Starts the specified animation anim (inventory or built-in) on the rigged mesh object associated with the current script.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.StopAnimation.documentation: Stops the specified animation anim (inventory, built-in, or UUID) on the avatar who granted the script the PERMISSION_TRIGGER_ANIMATION permission (automatically granted for attached or sat-on objects).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.StopHover.documentation: Stops the hover behavior (such as that initiated by llSetHoverHeight).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.StopLookAt.documentation: Stops causing the object to look at or point toward a target (canceling llLookAt or llRotLookAt).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.StopMoveToTarge.documentation: Stops the critically damped movement of the object toward a target (canceling llMoveToTarget). Use llStopLookAt to stop rotational tracking.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.StopObjectAnima.documentation: Stops the specified animation anim (inventory, built-in, or UUID) on the rigged mesh object associated with the current script.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.StopSound.documentation: Stops playback of the currently playing attached sound.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.StringLength.documentation: Returns an integer representing the number of characters in the string str (excluding the null terminator).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.StringToBase64.documentation: Returns the Base64 representation string of str, interpreting it as a UTF-8 byte sequence.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.StringTrim.documentation: Returns a copy of the string src with leading, trailing, or both types of whitespace (including spaces, tabs, and line feeds) eliminated, according to the specified trim type.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.SubStringIndex.documentation: (Index semantics) Returns the zero-based index of the first instance of the pattern substring inside the string source. Returns -1 if not found.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.TakeCamera.documentation: Deprecated (use llSetCameraParams instead). Formerly used to take control of the agent's camera.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.TakeControls.documentation: Intercepts inputs (keyboard/mouse clicks) from the agent, specifically those specified by controls. The boolean accept determines if events are generated, and pass_on determines if inputs also perform their default functions. Requires the PERMISSION_TAKE_CONTROLS runtime permission.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Tan.documentation: Returns a float representing the tangent of theta.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Target.documentation: Registers a positional target at position with a leeway radius range. This triggers at_target and not_at_target events. Returns an integer handle to unregister the target via llTargetRemove.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.TargetOmega.documentation: Applies a smooth client-side rotation around the local axis at a rate equal to spinrate multiplied by the magnitude of axis (in radians per second) with a force defined by gain. Set spinrate to 0.0 to cancel.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.TargetRemove.documentation: Removes the positional target specified by the integer handle registered with llTarget.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.TargetedEmail.documentation: Sends an email containing subject and message to the target (which can designate the owner or creator of the object).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.TeleportAgent.documentation: Teleports the owning agent (who must grant PERMISSION_TELEPORT) to a landmark in the object's inventory. If landmark is empty, teleports them to position within the current region. Upon arrival, the agent is turned to face look_at. Can only teleport the owner.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.TeleportAgentGl.documentation: Teleports the owning agent (who must grant PERMISSION_TELEPORT) to region_coordinates within a target region specified by global_coordinates. Upon landing, the agent faces the direction look_at. Can only teleport the owner.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.TeleportAgentHo.documentation: Teleports the avatar (who must be standing on land owned by the script owner) directly to their designated home location without warning (similar to a God Summons).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.TextBox.documentation: Opens an input text box dialog displaying message to the avatar. Submitting text chats the input string on channel as if said by the avatar.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ToLower.documentation: Returns a copy of the string src converted entirely to lowercase.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.ToUpper.documentation: Returns a copy of the string src converted entirely to uppercase.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.TransferLindenD.documentation: Transfers amount of L$ from the script owner to the destination avatar, requiring the PERMISSION_DEBIT permission. Returns a key query handle matching the resulting transaction_result event.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.TransferOwnersh.documentation: Transfers ownership of the object (or a copy of it, depending on flags) to the avatar agent_id. Returns an integer indicating the success or failure of the transfer.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.TriggerSound.documentation: Plays specified sound once at volume, centered at the object's current position but not attached (does not move with the object and cannot be stopped or adjusted). Does not affect attached sounds.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.TriggerSoundLim.documentation: Plays the specified sound once at volume, centered at the object but not attached, restricted to the axis-aligned bounding box defined by the coordinates top_north_east and bottom_south_west.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.UnSit.documentation: Forces the agent specified by id to stand up if they are sitting on the object containing the script, or are currently over land owned by the object's owner.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.UnescapeURL.documentation: Returns a string representing the unescaped/decoded version of url, replacing '%20' with spaces and decoding raw UTF-8 characters.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.UpdateCharacter.documentation: Updates settings for a pathfinding character using the parameters specified in options.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.UpdateKeyValue.documentation: Starts an asynchronous transaction to update the key k to value v inside the experience datastore. If checked is TRUE, the update fails with XP_ERROR_RETRY_UPDATE unless the existing value matches original_value.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.VecDist.documentation: Returns a float representing the undirected, non-negative distance between vectors vec_a and vec_b.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.VecMag.documentation: Returns a float representing the magnitude (geometric length) of the vector vec.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.VecNorm.documentation: Returns a normalized unit vector sharing the same direction as vec.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.VerifyRSA.documentation: Returns TRUE if the Base64-formatted signature is verified as valid for the message msg when using the digest algorithm and public_key. Returns FALSE otherwise.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.VolumeDetect.documentation: If detect is TRUE, enables VolumeDetect (object becomes phantom and physical objects/avatars can pass through it). Triggers collision_start on initial intersection and collision_end when intersection stops (standard collision events are suppressed while intersecting).

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.WanderWithin.documentation: Directs a pathfinding character to wander around a central coordinate origin, restricted within the bounding distance limits of dist and configured by options.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Water.documentation: Returns a float representing the water height directly below the prim's position offset by the vector offset.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Whisper.documentation: Whispers the text message msg on the specified channel. The message can be heard up to a 10m radius. All channels other than PUBLIC_CHANNEL (0) and DEBUG_CHANNEL (2147483647) are not sent to avatars and are used to communicate with scripts.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.Wind.documentation: Returns a vector representing the wind velocity at the prim's position offset by the vector offset.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.WorldPosToHUD.documentation: Returns the local position vector that places the center of the HUD object directly over the world coordinate world_pos as viewed by the current camera. Requires the PERMISSION_TRACK_CAMERA runtime permission.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.XorBase64.documentation: Correctly performs a bitwise exclusive OR (XOR) on Base64 strings str1 and str2, returning the result as a Base64 string. The string str2 repeats if it is shorter than str1.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.XorBase64String.documentation: Deprecated (use llXorBase64 instead). Retained for backwards compatibility. Incorrectly performs a bitwise exclusive OR (XOR) on Base64 strings str1 and str2.
Deprecated (use llXorBase64 instead). Correctly performs (unless nulls are present) a bitwise exclusive OR (XOR) on Base64 strings str1 and str2.

@sl-slua/global/llcompat.sRGB2Linear.documentation: Returns a vector representing the conversion of the color srgb from the sRGB colorspace into the linear RGB colorspace.

@sl-slua/global/ACTIVE.documentation:
Value: 0x2
Objects running a script or physically moving (using server resources). In llDetectedType(), it identifies physical objects and agents. In llSensor() or llSensorRepeat(), it searches for moving physical objects or scripted objects.

@sl-slua/global/AGENT.documentation:
Value: 0x1
Agents (avatars). In llDetectedType, it indicates an avatar. In llSensor or llSensorRepeat, it searches for avatars by legacy name (functionally identical to AGENT_BY_LEGACY_NAME, though using AGENT_BY_LEGACY_NAME is recommended instead).

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_ALWAYS_RUN.documentation:
Value: 0x1000
Used with llGetAgentInfo to determine if the queried avatar has 'Always Run' enabled or is using tap-tap-hold.

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_ATTACHMENTS.documentation:
Value: 0x2
Used with llGetAgentInfo to determine if the queried avatar has attachments.

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_AUTOMATED.documentation:
Value: 0x4000
Used with llGetAgentInfo to identify if the avatar is registered with Linden Lab as an automated/scripted agent (bot).

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_AUTOPILOT.documentation:
Value: 0x2000
Used with llGetAgentInfo to determine if the avatar is in autopilot mode, which is enabled when the user selects 'Go Here' on the ground or uses double-click autopilot.

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_AWAY.documentation:
Value: 0x40
Used with llGetAgentInfo to determine if the avatar is in 'away' mode, which indicates they toggled away or have been inactive for too long.

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_BUSY.documentation:
Value: 0x800
Used with llGetAgentInfo to determine if the avatar is in 'busy' mode.

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_BY_LEGACY_NAME.documentation:
Value: 0x1
Used to find agents by legacy name. In llDetectedType, it indicates an avatar. In llSensor or llSensorRepeat, it searches for avatars by legacy name.

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_BY_USERNAME.documentation:
Value: 0x10
Used to find agents by username (see Avatar Names).

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_CROUCHING.documentation:
Value: 0x400
Used with llGetAgentInfo to determine if the avatar is crouching.

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_FLOATING_VIA_SCRIP.documentation:
Value: 0x8000
Used with llGetAgentInfo to determine if the avatar is floating or hovering because of a scripted attachment using either llSetHoverHeight or llGroundRepel.

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_FLYING.documentation:
Value: 0x1
Used with llGetAgentInfo to determine if the queried avatar is flying or hovering.

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_IN_AIR.documentation:
Value: 0x100
Used with llGetAgentInfo to determine if the avatar is in the air (jumping, flying, or falling).

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_LIST_PARCEL.documentation:
Value: 1
Agents on the same parcel where the script is running.

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_LIST_PARCEL_OWNER.documentation:
Value: 2
Agents on any parcel in the region where the parcel owner is the same as the owner of the parcel under the scripted object.

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_LIST_REGION.documentation:
Value: 4
Returns any or all agents in the region.

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_MOUSELOOK.documentation:
Value: 0x8
Used with llGetAgentInfo to determine if the avatar is in mouselook.

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_ON_OBJECT.documentation:
Value: 0x20
Used with llGetAgentInfo to determine if the avatar is sitting on an object and linked to it.

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_SCRIPTED.documentation:
Value: 0x4
Used with llGetAgentInfo to determine if the avatar is carrying scripted objects or has scripted attachments.

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_SITTING.documentation:
Value: 0x10
Used with llGetAgentInfo to determine if the avatar is sitting.

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_TYPING.documentation:
Value: 0x200
Used with llGetAgentInfo to determine if the avatar is typing.

@sl-slua/global/AGENT_WALKING.documentation:
Value: 0x80
Used with llGetAgentInfo to determine if the queried avatar is walking, running, or crouch walking.

@sl-slua/global/ALL_SIDES.documentation:
Value: -1
Selects all sides of an object in an applicable function.

@sl-slua/global/ANIM_ON.documentation:
Value: 0x1
Enables texture animation. This must be set to start the animation and cleared to stop it.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_ANY_HUD.documentation:
Value: -1
A special constant representing all HUD attachment points when filtering for any HUD attachment.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_AVATAR_CENTER.documentation:
Value: 40
Attachment point for the avatar's geometric center or root.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_BACK.documentation:
Value: 9
Attachment point for the avatar's back.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_BELLY.documentation:
Value: 28
Attachment point for the avatar's belly, stomach, or tummy.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_CHEST.documentation:
Value: 1
Attachment point for the avatar's chest or sternum.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_CHIN.documentation:
Value: 12
Attachment point for the avatar's chin.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_FACE_JAW.documentation:
Value: 47
Attachment point for the avatar's jaw.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_FACE_LEAR.documentation:
Value: 48
Attachment point for the avatar's left ear (extended).

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_FACE_LEYE.documentation:
Value: 50
Attachment point for the avatar's left eye (extended).

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_FACE_REAR.documentation:
Value: 49
Attachment point for the avatar's right ear (extended).

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_FACE_REYE.documentation:
Value: 51
Attachment point for the avatar's right eye (extended).

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_FACE_TONGUE.documentation:
Value: 52
Attachment point for the avatar's tongue.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_GROIN.documentation:
Value: 53
Attachment point for the avatar's groin.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_HEAD.documentation:
Value: 2
Attachment point for the avatar's head.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_HIND_LFOOT.documentation:
Value: 54
Attachment point for the avatar's left hind foot.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_HIND_RFOOT.documentation:
Value: 55
Attachment point for the avatar's right hind foot.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_HUD_BOTTOM_LEFT.documentation:
Value: 36
Attachment point for HUD Bottom Left.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_HUD_BOTTOM_RIGHT.documentation:
Value: 38
Attachment point for HUD Bottom Right.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_HUD_TOP_CENTER.documentation:
Value: 33
Attachment point for HUD Top Center.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_HUD_TOP_LEFT.documentation:
Value: 34
Attachment point for HUD Top Left.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_HUD_TOP_RIGHT.documentation:
Value: 32
Attachment point for HUD Top Right.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_LEAR.documentation:
Value: 13
Attachment point for the avatar's left ear.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_LEFT_PEC.documentation:
Value: 29
Attachment point for the avatar's left pectoral.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_LEYE.documentation:
Value: 15
Attachment point for the avatar's left eye.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_LFOOT.documentation:
Value: 7
Attachment point for the avatar's left foot.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_LHAND.documentation:
Value: 5
Attachment point for the avatar's left hand.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_LHAND_RING1.documentation:
Value: 41
Attachment point for the avatar's left ring finger.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_LHIP.documentation:
Value: 25
Attachment point for the avatar's left hip.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_LLARM.documentation:
Value: 21
Attachment point for the avatar's left lower arm.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_LLLEG.documentation:
Value: 27
Attachment point for the avatar's left lower leg.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_LPEC.documentation:
Value: 30
Attachment point for the avatar's right pectoral (deprecated, use ATTACH_RIGHT_PEC).

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_LSHOULDER.documentation:
Value: 3
Attachment point for the avatar's left shoulder.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_LUARM.documentation:
Value: 20
Attachment point for the avatar's left upper arm.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_LULEG.documentation:
Value: 26
Attachment point for the avatar's left upper leg.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_LWING.documentation:
Value: 45
Attachment point for the avatar's left wing.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_MOUTH.documentation:
Value: 11
Attachment point for the avatar's mouth.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_NECK.documentation:
Value: 39
Attachment point for the avatar's neck.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_NOSE.documentation:
Value: 17
Attachment point for the avatar's nose.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_PELVIS.documentation:
Value: 10
Attachment point for the avatar's pelvis.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_REAR.documentation:
Value: 14
Attachment point for the avatar's right ear.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_REYE.documentation:
Value: 16
Attachment point for the avatar's right eye.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_RFOOT.documentation:
Value: 8
Attachment point for the avatar's right foot.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_RHAND.documentation:
Value: 6
Attachment point for the avatar's right hand (the default attachment point).

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_RHAND_RING1.documentation:
Value: 42
Attachment point for the avatar's right ring finger.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_RHIP.documentation:
Value: 22
Attachment point for the avatar's right hip.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_RIGHT_PEC.documentation:
Value: 30
Attachment point for the avatar's right pectoral.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_RLARM.documentation:
Value: 19
Attachment point for the avatar's right lower arm.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_RLLEG.documentation:
Value: 24
Attachment point for the avatar's right lower leg.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_RPEC.documentation:
Value: 29
Attachment point for the avatar's left pectoral (deprecated, use ATTACH_LEFT_PEC).

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_RSHOULDER.documentation:
Value: 4
Attachment point for the avatar's right shoulder.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_RUARM.documentation:
Value: 18
Attachment point for the avatar's right upper arm.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_RULEG.documentation:
Value: 23
Attachment point for the avatar's right upper leg.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_RWING.documentation:
Value: 46
Attachment point for the avatar's right wing.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_TAIL_BASE.documentation:
Value: 43
Attachment point for the avatar's tail base.

@sl-slua/global/ATTACH_TAIL_TIP.documentation:
Value: 44
Attachment point for the avatar's tail tip.

@sl-slua/global/BEACON_MAP.documentation:
Value: 1
Causes llMapBeacon to optionally display and focus the world map on the avatar's viewer.

@sl-slua/global/CAMERA_ACTIVE.documentation:
Value: 12
Option flag used with llSetCameraParams to turn scripted control of the camera on or off.

@sl-slua/global/CAMERA_BEHINDNESS_ANGLE.documentation:
Value: 8
Sets the angle in degrees within which the camera is not constrained by changes in target rotation.

@sl-slua/global/CAMERA_BEHINDNESS_LAG.documentation:
Value: 9
Sets how strongly the camera is forced to stay behind the target if outside of the behindness angle.

@sl-slua/global/CAMERA_DISTANCE.documentation:
Value: 7
Sets how far away the camera wants to be from its target.

@sl-slua/global/CAMERA_FOCUS.documentation:
Value: 17
Sets camera focus (target position) in region coordinates.

@sl-slua/global/CAMERA_FOCUS_LAG.documentation:
Value: 6
Sets how much the camera lags as it aims toward the target.

@sl-slua/global/CAMERA_FOCUS_LOCKED.documentation:
Value: 22
Option flag used with llSetCameraParams to lock the camera focus so it does not move.

@sl-slua/global/CAMERA_FOCUS_OFFSET.documentation:
Value: 1
Adjusts the camera focus position relative to the target.

@sl-slua/global/CAMERA_FOCUS_THRESHOLD.documentation:
Value: 11
Sets the radius of a sphere around the camera's target position within which its focus is not affected by target motion.

@sl-slua/global/CAMERA_PITCH.documentation:
Value: 0
Adjusts the angular amount that the camera aims straight ahead versus straight down, maintaining the same distance (analogous to 'incidence').

@sl-slua/global/CAMERA_POSITION.documentation:
Value: 13
Sets camera position in region coordinates.

@sl-slua/global/CAMERA_POSITION_LAG.documentation:
Value: 5
Sets how much the camera lags as it moves toward its ideal position.

@sl-slua/global/CAMERA_POSITION_LOCKED.documentation:
Value: 21
Option flag used with llSetCameraParams to lock the camera position so it does not move.

@sl-slua/global/CAMERA_POSITION_THRESHOL.documentation:
Value: 10
Sets the radius of a sphere around the camera's ideal position within which it is not affected by target motion.

@sl-slua/global/CHANGED_ALLOWED_DROP.documentation:
Value: 0x40
Object inventory changed because a user other than the owner (or the owner if the object is no-mod) added an item. This is only possible if enabled via llAllowInventoryDrop.

@sl-slua/global/CHANGED_COLOR.documentation:
Value: 0x2
Object's Blinn-Phong color or alpha parameters have changed.

@sl-slua/global/CHANGED_INVENTORY.documentation:
Value: 0x1
Prim inventory has changed by someone who has modification rights to it.

@sl-slua/global/CHANGED_LINK.documentation:
Value: 0x20
Number of prims making up the object or avatars seated on it has changed. Also occurs when duplicating a linked object or when a prim changes type or shape. Does not trigger on attach/detach, sit/unsit in attachments, or single prim duplication.

@sl-slua/global/CHANGED_MEDIA.documentation:
Value: 0x800
Prim Media on the prim has changed.

@sl-slua/global/CHANGED_OWNER.documentation:
Value: 0x80
Object has changed owners. Triggers in the original object when a user takes it, copies it, or deeds it to a group, and in the new object when it is first rezzed.

@sl-slua/global/CHANGED_REGION.documentation:
Value: 0x100
Object has changed regions by crossing a boundary or teleporting (if attached). Triggers only in the root prim of a linkset.

@sl-slua/global/CHANGED_REGION_START.documentation:
Value: 0x400
Region containing this object has just come online.

@sl-slua/global/CHANGED_RENDER_MATERIAL.documentation:
Value: 0x1000
Render material (prim material ID or material overrides) has changed on one or more faces.

@sl-slua/global/CHANGED_SCALE.documentation:
Value: 0x8
Prim scale of at least one prim in the linked object has changed. Only the root prim receives this event.

@sl-slua/global/CHANGED_SHAPE.documentation:
Value: 0x4
Prim base shape (PRIM_TYPE, such as box, prism, torus, taper, twist, or cut) has changed.

@sl-slua/global/CHANGED_TELEPORT.documentation:
Value: 0x200
Avatar this object is attached to has teleported. Triggers only in the root prim of an attachment. Does not occur for child prims or 'sit teleports'. If scripts are disabled at the destination, the event queues and triggers after moving to a script-enabled parcel.

@sl-slua/global/CHANGED_TEXTURE.documentation:
Value: 0x10
Prim texture parameters (shine/bump settings, repeats, flip, rotation, offset, or texture) have changed.

@sl-slua/global/CHARACTER_ACCOUNT_FOR_SK.documentation:
Value: 14
If set to FALSE, the pathfinding character will not attempt to catch up on lost time when performance is low, potentially providing more reliable (though potentially more stuttery) movement. Default is TRUE.

@sl-slua/global/CHARACTER_AVOIDANCE_MODE.documentation:
Value: 5
Specifies which objects a pathfinding character avoids (other characters, dynamic obstacles like fast-moving objects and avatars, or both). Combined using bit flags; setting to AVOID_NONE disables avoidance for both categories.

@sl-slua/global/CHARACTER_CMD_JUMP.documentation:
Value: 0x01
Makes the character jump. Requires a height parameter between 0.1m and 2.0m as the first element of the llExecCharacterCmd option list.

@sl-slua/global/CHARACTER_CMD_SMOOTH_STO.documentation:
Value: 2
Stops any current pathfinding operation in a smooth fashion.

@sl-slua/global/CHARACTER_DESIRED_SPEED.documentation:
Value: 1
